Affects Foe

name: Active EPS Management
short: EPS Adapts to Power Levels, Weapon Firing Modes add Damage
detailed:
While Current Power level average below average Power Setting: +25% EPS Flow ''(recovers power faster)''

While Current Power average above average Power Setting: -50% EPS Flow ''(keeps power longer)''

During Reroute Reserves to Weapons or an Energy Weapon Firing Mode:
* Above effects tripled
* +25% Energy Weapon Bonus Damage
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Duderstadt Miracle Worker Science Spearhead]]
basic:
* While this trait is slotted, whenever your power levels are on average below their current settings, you gain a large boost to Electro-Plasma System Flow. Whenever your power levels are on average above their current setting, you gain a large penalty to EPS Flow.
* Activating Beams: Overload, Beams: Fire at Will, Cannons: Rapid Fire, Cannon: Scatter Volley, or Reroute Reserves to Weapons triples the effect and adds additional Bonus Damage.
* ''[[Skill: Electro-Plasma System Flow|Electro-Plasma System Flow]] increases the speed at which power changes to match current subsystem settings. If power is low, a high EPS Flow will refill it more quickly. If power is above-normal, a high EPS Flow will empty it more quickly, but a low EPS Flow will allow it to linger longer.''

obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Khitomer Alliance Battlecruiser]]
basic:
*You gain bonus damage based on what percentage of your shields is missing. When you defeat a foe, you will restore a substantial portion of your shields.
*''Ship blog lore:'' While comparing ship power level and sensor data with events occurring in combat, a group of analysts noticed that power can be diverted from some sub-components of a weakened shield facing for other systems. As more power in weapons has a correlation with decreasing shield strain, that was deemed the optimal subsystem to shunt that newly discovered excess. Then, after the shield systems have cooled down more from the decreased overall power flow, the power can be shunted back, to give a significant boost to shield strength. The Alliance Battlecruiser was designed to make optimal use of this knowledge, but with more testing they believe it can be used on other ships as well.[https://www.arcgames.com/en/games/star-trek-online/news/detail/11351133-command-the-first-klingon%2Ffederation-ship%21]

name: Bold Piloting
short: Gain Dmg Aura and Extra Speed from Speed/Pilot Buffs
detailed: When Activating any Speed Buffing Bridge Officer Ability, or any Pilot Bridge Officer Ability:<br>+130% Flight Speed for 30 sec<br>+130% Flight Turn Rate for 30 sec<br>Enables the Locarno Maneuver status for 30 sec<br>Locarno Maneuver deals _____ kinetic damage (20% Shield Penetration) to enemy ships when you graze them while flying<br>Scales with your current flying speed
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Nova One Pilot Raider]]
basic: * There are bold pilots, and then there are old pilots - but there are no old bold pilots. After being expelled from [[Starfleet Academy]], [[ma:Nick Locarno|<span style="cursor: help;" title="Nick Locarno at Memory Alpha">Nick Locarno</span>]] became obsessed with proving he was an Ace Pilot. He would forgo safety measures in order to show off his skills. One such case involved tampering with standard engine boosting protocols to achieve greater maximum speed. This let him deal damage to other ships and partially bypass shields by grazing during hot pursuits. Due to stress applied to engine subsystems, Locarno's special move could only be used sparingly. This move gained intergalactic notoriety, until it one day became known as: the Locarno Maneuver.

* -33% Weapon Power Cost for 20 sec
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Constitution Temporal Light Cruiser]]
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Constitution Miracle Worker Light Cruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[D7 Temporal Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Legendary D7 Intel Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Legendary T'liss Light Intel Warbird]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[T'liss Temporal Warbird]]
basic: * Activating a Hull Healing Bridge Officer ability will apply a weapon power cost reduction and a hull regeneration buff. The hull regeneration buff's effectiveness will increase when trigged at low hull strength.

name: By The Book
short: Extend Anomaly Duration
detailed:
* When activating Abilities that create Anomalies or any Temporal Bridge Officer Ability:
** Extend Duration of All Active Bridge Officer Anomalies by 2 sec (max once per 2 sec)
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Grissom Light Science Vessel]]
basic: * Activating Bridge Officer Abilities that create Anomalies, or any Temporal Bridge Officer Ability, will extend the duration of all of your active Bridge Officer Anomalies by 2 seconds. This cannot extend any Anomaly's duration beyond double its original value.

name: Calculated Broadside
short: Reduced Aggro and Better Broadside from FAW or Intel.
detailed:
Upon activating a Fire At Will or Intel Bridge Officer Ability, for 15 sec (10 sec recharge):
* +35% Beam Weapon Damage
* +30 Damage Resistance Rating along the side arcs, doubled if in Threatening Stance. If not in Threatening Stance, -60% Threat Generation.
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Excelsior II Intel Heavy Cruiser]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, activating a [[Beams: Fire at Will (ability)|Beams: Fire at Will]] or an [[Intelligence Officer (specialization)|Intelligence]] Bridge Officer Ability improves both Beam Damage and all Damage Resistance Rating in the side arcs. If [[Threatening Stance (ability)|Threatening Stance]] is activated, the Damage Resistance bonus is doubled; if not, aggro generated by attacks is massively reduced.

name: Calm Before the Storm
short: +All Damage After Long Delay.
detailed:
*While in Combat:
**Gain 1 ''Calm'' stack every 2 sec
**Each stack of ''Calm'' gives +5 All Damage Resistance Rating
*At 10 stacks gain ''Storm'' for 20 sec:
**Removes all stacks of ''Calm''
**+33% Firing Cycle Haste for Energy Weapons
**Bridge Officer abilities recharge 33% faster
*''(Stacks of Calm can't be gained while Storm is active)''
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Cardassian Ghemor-class Intel Flight Deck Carrier|Cardassian Ghemor Intel Flight Deck Carrier]]
basic: * You will gain a Calm counter every 2 seconds while in combat. Exiting combat will clear all stacks of Calm. Once you have 10 counters you will gain the Storm buff. While under the effects of Storm, you will gain a large boost to your damage for a short time.

name: Carrier Wave Shield Hacking
short: Tractor Beam or Intel BOff Abilities cause Shields Offline.
detailed:
*Activate Tractor Beam or Intel:
** Shields Offline for 5 sec
** +30% Kinetic Damage with Tractor Beam
obtained: *<span class="veryrare" title="Very rare item" style="cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #303;">'''[Starship Trait: Carrier Wave Shield Hacking]'''</span> from the [[Discovery: Emerald Chain Lock Box]] or the [[Infinity Prize Pack: Starship Trait]].
basic: * Using advanced Artificial Intelligence modeling inspired by the Sphere Data, you can use connections to the enemy ship caused by [[Tractor Beam (ability)|Tractor Beam]] or [[Bridge officer and kit abilities#Intelligence Abilities|Intel]] Powers to calculate another ship's shield's modulation frequency. Activating Tractor Beam, or any Intelligence Bridge Officer Ability takes enemy shields offline for a brief duration. Additionally, your Tractor Beam benefits from increased damage.

name: Catastrophic Overload
short: Jam Sensors causes AoE Disable and Electric Damage on Expiration.
detailed:
*To up to 5 foes within 3km
** Foes: ____ Electrical Damage (Ignores Shields)
** Foes: ___ Electrical Damage (Ignores Shields)
** Foes: Disable for 3 sec
obtained:
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[D9 Dreadnought Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> <span class="rare" title="Rare item" style="cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #023;">'''[Starship Trait: Catastrophic Overload / Layered Shielding (Federation)]'''</span> ''(Retired)''
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> <span class="rare" title="Rare item" style="cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #023;">'''[Starship Trait: SIF Shunt / Catastrophic Overload (Romulan)]'''</span> ''(Retired)''
basic: *Activating [[Jam Sensors (ability)|Jam Sensors]] will cause it to deal a high electrical damage and disable targets in a large area of effect when it expires.

name: Catom Reconstruction
short: Hazard Emitters or Intel BOff Abilities enable Automated Low-HP Heals
detailed:
* On Activation, build 1 charge of Catom Reconstruction (max 10)
* While below 50% Hull, remove 1 charge of Catom Reconstruction to restore 10% of Maximum Hull (once per 5 sec)
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Caelian Intel Multi-Mission Explorer]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, activating [[Hazard Emitters (ability)|Hazard Emitters]] or any [[Intel]] Bridge Officer Ability will build up charges which will enable automated healing while your Hull is low. If you have one or more charge, one will be consumed every 5 seconds while below 50% Max Hull in order to immediately restore 10% of your Max Hull.

name: Ceaseless Momentum
short: Firing Torpedoes buffs kinetic damage & resist.
detailed:
When firing any torpedo:
*+5% Bonus [[Damage type (space)#Kinetic damage|Kinetic Damage]] for 45 sec
*+5 Bonus Kinetic Damage Resistance Rating for 45 sec
:''(Stacks up to 5 times)''
*-1 sec to recharge time of torpedoes
obtained:
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Na'Qjej Intel Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> <span style="font-family:'FuturaBody', Tahoma, Geneva, Arial;" class="rare lht-data">[[[Starship Trait: Ceaseless Momentum (Federation)|<span class="rare">Starship Trait: Ceaseless Momentum (Federation)</span>]]]</span> ''(Retired)''
basic: * Firing any torpedo weapon will decrease the cooldown of all of your torpedoes slightly. Additionally, it will grant you bonus Kinetic Damage and Kinetic Damage Resistance for a short duration. This bonus stacks up to five times.

name: Charged Particle Reaction
short: Charged Particle Burst causing a chain reaction.
detailed:
*  Activating Charged Particle Burst applies '''Charged Particle Reaction''' to each target hit:
** Disable cloaking systems for 5 sec
** -__% Shield Resistance for 5 sec
** -____ Targets Shields
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Brigid Multi-Mission Surveillance Explorer]]
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Caelian Intel Multi-Mission Explorer]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Ahgamas Multi-Mission Surveillance Vessel]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Galas Surveillance Explorer Warbird]]
basic: * Activating [[Charged Particle Burst (ability)|Charged Particle Burst]] will cause a secondary, less potent version of Charged Particle Burst to be emitted from each target hit by this ability, causing a chain reaction.

name: Checkmate
short: Exotic Damage and Projectile Damage Enhanced by Control Bridge Officer Abilities.
detailed:
When activating a control Bridge Officer Ability:
* +30% Exotic Damage for 15 sec
* +30% Projectile Weapon Damage for 15 sec
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Yorktown Science Star Cruiser]] & [[Legendary Verity Command Dreadnought Cruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Gorkon Science Battlecruiser]] & [[Legendary Bortasqu' Command Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Flambard Science Dreadnought Warbird]] & [[Legendary Scimitar Intel Dreadnought Warbird]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, activating a control Bridge Officer ability will provide a boost to your Exotic Damage and Projectile Weapon damage for a short time.

name: Clear for Action
short: +Firing Cycle Rate
detailed: * When activating [[Evasive Maneuvers (ability)|Evasive Maneuvers]]: +25% Firing Cycle Haste
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Shangri-La Command Warship]]
basic: * When you activate Evasive Maneuvers, gain 25% Firing Cycle Haste for all Weapons

name: Cold-Hearted
short: Add Slow/Drain/Resistance Debuff to Weapons.
detailed:
* While active, Energy Weapons apply ''Cold-Hearted'' to foes, once per firing cycle.
* Each stack of ''Cold-Hearted'' causes:
** -9.1% Flight Speed for 15 sec
** -10 All Damage Resistance Rating for 15 sec
** -2 to Current and Max All Subsystem Power for 15 sec
** ''5 stacks max (from all sources)''
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Breen Plesh Tral Heavy Raider]]
basic: * After activating [[Auxiliary Power to the Emergency Battery (ability)|Auxiliary Power to the Emergency Battery]], or any [[Pilot (specialization)#Bridge Officer Abilities|Pilot]] Bridge Officer ability, damage caused by your energy weapons also applies a resistance debuff to the damaged foe, while also reducing their current and max power in all subsystems, and reducing their flight speed. This effect stacks multiple times, but only applies to the first shot of each weapon's firing cycle.

name: Collect and Consume
short: Pull and Steal Health from nearby Foes, from Drain Abilities.
detailed:
* ''Collect and Consume'': Drain Abilities cause -__ Pull to foes within 5km, then ____ Radiation Damage ''(Ignores Shields)'' to foes within 2.5km
* Restore Hull equal to 20% of Radiation Damage dealt by ''Collect and Consume''
* May only be triggered once every 10 sec
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Son'a Collector Science Dreadnought]]
basic: * Activating any [[Skill: Drain Expertise#Bridge Officer abilities|Subsystem Drain or Shield Drain]] Bridge Officer Ability applies an instant Pull to all foes within 5km, dragging them a bit closer to you. After this Pull is done, all Foes within 2.5km will suffer a small amount of Radiation Damage. A portion of the damage dealt by this trait will be returned to you as a Hull Heal.

name: Command Frequency
short: Improves Fleet Support.
detailed:
* Modifies '''Fleet Support''':
** Cooldown reduced by 5 (''basic'' variant) or 10 minutes (other variants)
** Removes "Low Health" restriction
** ''Superior'' variant: Summons an additional level 66 allied Frigate
obtained:
* <u>Command Frequency</u>: 15 [[Specialization Point|points]] spent into the [[Command Officer (specialization)|Command Officer]] specialization.
* <u>Improved Command Frequency</u>: 30 points spent into the Command Officer specialization.
* <u>Superior Command Frequency</u>: [[Temporal Agent Recruitment|Temporal Agent]] account-wide reward after spending 30 points in 3 primary specializations.
basic: * Your advanced Command training has granted you access to special communications frequencies that can be used to more readily call for assistance in battle. All ranks of [[Fleet Support (ability)|Fleet Support]] no longer have a "Low Hull" requirement to be triggered, and they can be used more frequently. Additionally, Superior Fleet Support now summons an extra Frigate.

name: Commanded Singularities
short: Command and Singularity abilities summon micro singularities.
detailed:
When activating a Command or Singularity Ability:
*Spawn a Singularity for 30 sec
**X Kinetic Damage per sec
**Repel -0.54 per sec
*''Max once per 10 seconds''
obtained: *<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Dhailkhina Command Strike Wing Warbird]]
basic: * Activating any [[Command Bridge Officer Ability|Command]] or [[:Category:Singularity Core abilities|Singularity]] ability will summon a micro singularity at your current target for several seconds, dealing kinetic damage and pulling foes inwards. If you do not have a foe targeted, it will instead appear 5km in front of you. This can only occur once per several seconds.

name: Complex Plasma Fires
short: Stacking Plasma DoT on Firing Modes
detailed:
* During Energy Weapon Firing Modes, Plasma Weapons apply __ stacking Plasma Damage per sec for 30 sec (Ignores Shields, scales with Weapon Power)
* If Shield Facing is down deal an additional __ Plasma Damage
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Gorn Hunter Pilot Raider]]
basic:
* Each time you use an Energy Weapon Firing Mode, your Plasma Weapon volleys will add a stacking Plasma Damage Over Time effect to the hit Foe. This DoT stacks up to 100 times. If the targeted Shield Facing is down, deal additional Plasma Damage.
* Changes to the chemical composition of the Plasma produce deadly knock-on effects. The modified Plasma causes spitting fires, which is a type of fire that frequently creates gouts of ejecta that spread the hazard over the surface of the ship. This has a cumulative effect, eventually bringing down even the largest of prey.

name: Concealed Repairs
short: When you Cloak or Placate an enemy, Heal and recharge Bridge Officer abilities.
detailed:
On Cloak Self or Placate Enemy:
* Repair 33% of your ship's hull over 10 secs
* Recharge 25% of Bridge Officer Ability over 10 secs
* 45 sec recharge
obtained: * <span class="veryrare" title="Very rare item" style="cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #303;">'''[Starship Trait: Concealed Repairs]'''</span> from the [[Kelvin Divergence Lock Box]] or the [[Infinity Prize Pack: Starship Trait]].
basic: * Cloaking the starship or placating an enemy repairs 33% of your ship's hull over 10 seconds, and recharges Bridge Officer Abilities by 25% in the same period. 45 second cooldown. It is wisest to repair one's starship outside the line of fire.

name: Confederation Furor
short: Weapon Power from Defeating Foes.
detailed:
*On defeating Foe: Adds 6 Power to Weapon Subsystem for 30 sec
*''(Stacks up to 3 times, any additional foes will grant a brief overflow)''
obtained: *<span class="veryrare" title="Very rare item" style="cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #303;">'''[Starship Trait: Confederation Furor]'''</span> from the [[A Safe Galaxy Lock Box]].
basic: * Defeating Foes adds a small boost to the power to weapon subsystem for a moderate duration, and for the next several seconds activations of Confederation Furor provide an increased boost. This effect stacks up to 3 times, any additional foes will grant a brief overflow. A safe galaxy, is a human galaxy.

name: Constructive - Destructive Field Interference
short: Tractor Beams steal shield, Energy Drains reduce resists
detailed:
Tractor Beams steal shield, Energy Drains reduce resists
* When activating a Tractor Beam BOFF ability:
** Drains Foe of -____ Shield from all facings and grants you ___ Shield to all facings per 0.5s
* When activating an Energy Drain BOFF ability:
** Reduces primary target's Kinetic and Phaser Damage Resistance by 30 for 20 sec
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Valdres Command Strike Wing Escort]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, your Tractor Beam BOFF abilities steal Shield strength from your Foe's ship and add it to your own (all Shield Facings). Additionally, your Energy Drain BOFF abilities reduce your Foe's Kinetic and Phaser Damage Resistance Rating.

name: Continuing Mission
short: Team defensive bonuses during Command and Fleet Abilities.
detailed:
*Bonuses to Team when your ship is affected by a Command or Fleet ability:
**+5% Maximum Hull
**Up to +50% Hull Regeneration, increasing based on missing Hull
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Verity Command Dreadnought Cruiser]]
basic: * While you are affected by a [[Specialization: Command Officer|Command Bridge Officer Ability]] or a [[Ability: Science Fleet|Science]], [[Ability: Tactical Fleet|Tactical]], or [[Ability: Engineering Fleet|Engineering]] Fleet Captain Ability, your team receives improved Maximum Hull. Additionally, they receive improved Hull Regeneration that increases as their ship takes damage.

name: Controlled Aggression
short: Temp Op or Universal Consoles give Control Expertise based on EPG.
detailed: *Using a Temporal Operative Bridge Officer ability or a Universal Console applies +__ Starship Control Expertise ''(Improves Control Effects / Resistance to Same)'' for 20 sec (scales on Exotic Particle Generators: min +10, max +60)
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Terran Cygnus Battlecruiser]]
basic: * Using a [[Universal Console]] or [[Temporal Operative (specialization)#Bridge Officer Abilities|Temporal Operative]] Bridge Officer Ability grants a bonus to your [[Skill: Control Expertise|Control Expertise]] skill based on your current amount of [[Skill: Exotic Particle Generator|Exotic Particle Generator]]s skill. Minimum bonus 10, maximum bonus 60. Subsequent activations will refresh this buff's duration.

Page: Cooperation is the Dominant Strategy (starship trait)
name: Cooperation is the Dominant Strategy
short: Using Powers on Allies provides additional bonuses
detailed:
Using a Bridge Officer Ability or Universal Console on an ally applies '''Friendship is Science''', which stacks up to 5 times and grants:

* Non-Hangar Allies: +10% Bonus Damage for 30 sec
* Allied Hangar Pets and Separated Ship Segments: +20% Bonus Damage for 30 sec
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Friendship Command Flight Deck Carrier]]
basic:
* Using a Bridge Officer or Console Ability on an Ally provides bonus Damage. This buff stacks up to 5 times, lasts 30 sec, and each new application refreshes the duration of all stacks. If the target is a Hangar Pet, it receives a much larger bonus.
:Again and again, both in the natural world and interstellar politics, the simple ability to work together has proven indispensable. Groups which can adapt to each other and set aside their differences thrive.

name: Coordinated Assault
short: Beam: Overload and Cannon: Rapid Fire apply to your Hangar Pets.
detailed:
* Activating Beam: Overload I, II or III:
** Grants Beam: Overload I to all hangar pets within 10km
* Activating Cannon: Rapid Fire I, II or III:
** Grants Cannon: Rapid Fire I to all hangar pets within 10km
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Alita Heavy Strike Wing Escort]] & [[Legendary Akira Multi-Mission Command Cruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Qa'Tel Flight Deck Raptor]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Jhu'ael Tactical Carrier Warbird]]
basic:
* Activating [[Beam: Overload (ability)|Beam: Overload]] I, II or III will allow your [[Hangar pet]]s to use Beam: Overload I. Using [[Cannon: Rapid Fire (ability)|Cannon: Rapid Fire]] I, II or III will allow your pets to use Cannon: Rapid Fire I.
* Note: Your pets must have weapons that are compatible with these attack upgrades in order to benefit from this starship trait.

name: Corrosive Impact
short: On Decloak - Stacking DoT on all weapons
detailed:
:to self: +___% Plasma Damage

:to self: +___% Plasma Damage

:___ Plasma Damage every 1 sec for 10 sec
obtained: *<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Kiith Intel Warbird]]
basic:
* [[Romulan]] technicians have worked tirelessly to provide additional damage to any ship that exits cloak, making sure that their major military and support vessels can play to that advantage.

:Temporal energy is transferred to your weapons to create a corrosive DoT effect to your weapons which stacks with each hit on the enemy for up to 10 seconds.

name: Council of Thought
short: Damage Resistance from Nearby Allies.
detailed:
* For each Ally within 10km, gain one stack of ''Council of Thought'' (10 stacks max). Each stack grants:
**+5 All Damage Resistance Rating
**+2% Defense
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Xindi-Insectoid Olaen Heavy Escort Carrier]]
basic: * Benefit from the awareness offered by having coordinated allies nearby, gaining Defense and Damage Resistance for each ally within 10km. Hangar Pets contribute to the nearby ally count, but Mines, Turrets or Targetable Torpedoes do not.

name: Crescent Wave Discharge
short: Beam: Overload and Pilot BOff Abilities grant Crescent Wave Counters.
detailed:
When activating Beam: Overload or any Pilot BOff Ability:
* Gain Crescent Wave Counter for 120 sec
* At 3 counters:
** to target: X Disruptor Damage
** to target: Disables 1 Subsystem for 3 sec
** self: Prevents gaining Crescent Wave Counters for 30 sec
obtained: * <span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Elachi S'ateth Escort]]
basic: * Activating [[Beam: Overload (ability)|Beam: Overload]] or any [[Pilot (specialization)#Bridge Officer Abilities|Pilot]] ability generates a Crescent Wave Counter for 2 minutes. After obtaining 3 counters you will fire a devastating Crescent Wave blast at your target, dealing extreme disruptor damage and reducing their damage resistance.

name: Critical Systems
short: +Critical Chance and +Critical Damage after using Emergency Power BOff Ability.
detailed:
Critical Systems/Improved Critical Systems:
* to self: +2%/+3% Critical Chance and for 10/15 sec when using an Emergency Power bridge officer ability
* to self: +10%/+15% Critical Severity for 10/15 sec when using an Emergency Power bridge officer ability
obtained:
*<u>Critical Systems</u>: account-wide unlock after completing half of all Story Arcs as a [[Temporal Agent Event|Temporal Agent]].
*<u>Improved Critical Systems</u>: account-wide unlock after completing all Story Arcs as a Temporal Agent.
basic: * Each time you use an Emergency Power bridge officer ability, you gain a Critical Damage and Critical Chance buff for a short time. This buff does not stack, but refreshes every time an Emergency Power is used.

name: Cryonic Siphon
short: Energy Siphon reduces Shield Hardness and Damage Resistance.
detailed:
* Foe: to target: -15 All Damage Resistance Rating for 10 sec
* Foe: Decreases Shield Resistance by 20% for 10 sec
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Breen Chel Boalg Warship]]
basic: * Cryonic Siphon will drastically reduce the target's shield hardness and damage resistance while [[Energy Siphon (ability)|Energy Siphon]] is active on its target.

name: Cultural Conquest
short: Weapon Firing Modes improve damage, remove hostile effects.
detailed:
* Weapon Firing Modes apply +25% Increased Damage for 15 sec
* Dealing Weapon Damage to Foes that have Debuffed, DoTed, or Controlled you improves the bonus to +50% and removes one such effect from you
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[World Razer Temporal Ops Juggernaut]]
basic:
* Activating a Weapon Firing Mode improves Damage dealt for a moderate duration. Dealing Weapon Damage to a Foe that has afflicted you with a Control, Debuff, or DoT effect removes one such effect and improves the increased Damage to double the base value. Removing negative effects has a 1.5 second cooldown per Foe in PVP. Weapon Firing Modes are powers which replace the default behavior of a weapon.
* One must truly immerse one's self in the culture of one's enemies. It is not enough simply to overwhelm through superior firepower, for that only brings physical victory, and only then to battles that were already won. True brilliance, true victory, comes from taking your enemies' spirit into yourself, growing from it, and using your gestalt superiority to crush them. Take what you can from them, and show them that their best selves aren't the tenth part of what you are. In the doing of this, the display of it, they can be brought to heel in not just one battle, but all the battles to come.

name: Damn the Torpedoes
short: +All Damage Resistance Rating vs Projectile and destroy nearest Mine or Targetable Torpedo while above 50% Throttle.
detailed:
* While Throttle is at or above 50%:
** +100 to +200 All Damage Resistance Rating vs. Projectile Weapons (scales with Throttle)
** Once per 1 sec, destroy nearest Mine or Targetable Torpedo within 5km
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Farragut Temporal Cruiser]]
==Notes==
* The trait is named for the possibly apocryphal quote from Union Rear Admiral [[Wikipedia:David Farragut|David Farragut]], [[Wikipedia:Battle of Mobile Bay#%22Damn the torpedoes%22|"Damn the torpedoes, full speed ahead!"]]
basic: * Keeping your ship's Throttle above 50% will grant additional Damage Resistance Rating against all projectile weapons, and will periodically destroy the nearest Mine or Targetable Torpedo.

name: Dampen Energy Signatures
short: +Stealth, +Dmg, -Threat for Hangar Pets after activating Intel BOff Abilities or Mask Energy Signature.
detailed:
To your [[Hangar Pet]]s for 10 sec:
*+5% Bonus All Damage
*-50% Threat Generation
*+4,000 Stealth
*+15 Defense Rating
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Jem'Hadar Vanguard Carrier]]
basic: * Activation of [[Mask Energy Signature (ability)|Mask Energy Signature]] or any [[Intelligence Officer (specialization)#Bridge Officer Abilities|Intel]] Bridge Officer Ability will grant your [[hangar pet]]s a damage boost, a large amount of stealth and significantly reduce their threat generation for a short time. Hangar Pets do not break their stealth even while they are attacking.

name: Darmok and Jalad
short: Unshielded Hits Debuff Foe and Reduce Captain Ability Cooldowns
detailed:
Once per Foe, damaging an unshielded facing allows you to beam their captain away:
* to target: Disable for 6 sec
* to target: -33.3% All Damage for 60 sec
* to Self: -10% Recharge Time on Captain Abilities
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Tamarian Deep Space Cruiser]]
basic: * Your first weapon hit against an unshielded quadrant on a foe will allow you to beam their commanding officer away from their bridge, resulting in momentary confusion and a long-lasting debuff to their outgoing damage. Your ship will in turn reap the benefits of being prepared for this tactic, gaining an instant reduction to all Captain Ability Cooldowns. This may only trigger once per enemy ship.

name: Deadly Appearances
short: Decloaking grants Shield Pen, Weapon Haste.
detailed:
When Decloaking :
* +50% Shield Penetration for Projectile Weapons for 10 sec
* +50% Firing Cycle Haste for Energy Weapons for 10 sec 
* ''(Max once per 40 seconds)''
obtained: *<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Legendary B'rel Pilot Bird-of-Prey]]
basic: * Decloaking will grant you a significant bonus to [[Skill: Shield Penetration|Shield Penetration]] and Weapon [[Haste]].

name: Delphic Phasing
short: Criticals grant +Energy Res, Delayed Immunity.
detailed:
: When you critically hit gain 1 stack of ''Partial Delphic Phasing'' (once per 2 seconds)
:* Self+ +5 All Energy Damage Resistance Rating per stack of ''Partial Delphic Phasing'' for 15 sec (Max 10 stacks)
:* At 10 stacks of ''Partial Delphic Phasing'':
:** Self: Immunity to All Energy Damage for 5 sec
:** Self: Clears all stacks of ''Partial Delphic Phasing'' and prevents new stacks for 45 sec
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Sphere Builder Edoulg Science Vessel]]
basic: * You will gain a stack of Partial Delphic Phasing each time you score a critical hit. You may only generate 1 stack every 2 seconds. Each stack of Partial Delphic Phasing provides an increase to All Energy Damage resistance rating and lasts for a short duration. At 10 stacks of Delphic Phasing, you become immune to Energy Damage for a short time. After this effect wears off, you will be unable to generate stacks of Delphic Phasing for a period of time.

name: Delphic Shockwave
short: Photonic Shockwave creates Radiation hazards.
detailed:
* Self: Removes the Repel effect from your Photonic Shockwave ability
* Self: Using Photonic Shockwave leaves behind a level __ '''Delphic Expanse Anomaly''':
** Foe: ____ Radiation Damage (Ignores Shields) every 0.5 sec for 5 seconds (up to 5 foes in 3km radius)
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Sphere Builder Denuos Dreadnought Carrier]]
basic: * Your Photonic Shockwave Science Bridge Officer ability will leave behind a localized anomaly that mimics the effects of the Delphic Expanse. Enemies that enter this hazard will suffer radiation damage over time and have their damage resistance reduced.

name: Demolition Teams
short: Delayed Kinetic Damage Aura.
detailed:
Demolition Teams/Improved Demolition Teams:
* Every 4 sec / 2 sec, applies a Demolition Team debuff to your primary target (or nearest foe) within a 2km radius
* Once 5 debuffs / 3 debuffs applied, deals _____ Kinetic Damage (100% Shield Penetration)
* Additional Demolition Teams cannot be applied for 12 sec / 8 sec after a successful detonation.
obtained:
*<u>Demolition Teams</u>: 15 points spent into the [[Commando (specialization)|Commando specialization]].
*<u>Improved Demolition Teams</u>: [[Gamma Recruitment]] account-wide reward after spending 45 points in any specializations (replaces Demolition Teams).
basic:
* While within a short distance of your foe, you will periodically beam over commando squads trained in demolition, to plant charges aboard the enemy vessel. After sufficient charges have been placed, they will be detonated to deal shield-ignoring [[kinetic damage]].
* Demolition charges that haven't yet been detonated can be removed using [[Tactical Team (ability)|Tactical Team]], or will also expire harmlessly after a short duration if the attacker does not remain within the short transporter range.

name: Designated Target
short: Killing Focused Assault target grants +Damage Buff and Heal.
detailed:
If target of Focused Assault is destroyed while active, allies within 5km of enemy gain '''''Designated Target:'''''
* Target: Recover 20% of Max Hull Hit Points 
* Target: +10% Bonus All Damage for 15 sec
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Theseus Temporal Escort]]
basic: * When you kill a target affected by your [[Focused Assault (ability)|Focused Assault]] ability, allies within 5km of the defeated target will gain a moderate hull heal and damage boost.

name: Desperate Repairs
short: Large Shield and Hull Heal after 3 incoming critical hits.
detailed:
* When critically hit: Grants 1 Desperation counter for 120 sec
* At 3 counters:
** self: +_____ Shield Regeneration applied once to each facing
** +_______ Hit Points
** Prevents gaining Desperation counters for 60 sec
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Guardian Cruiser]] & [[Mirror Guardian Cruiser]]
basic: * Each time your starship is critically hit, you receive a desperation counter. Immediately upon receiving a third Desperation counter you will receive a large hull and shield heal and will be unable to gain Desperation counters for a while. The heal will only trigger if you are below 75% of your Maximum Hull.

name: Destabilizing Disruptor Enhancer
short: Disruptor DoT, Stacks ; Disruptor AoE
detailed:
When activating an Engineering Command or Intelligence Bridge Officer ability, for 30 seconds:
*Every 0.5 sec while doing energy damage your weapons apply ___ Disruptor DoT for 10 sec (Max 15 stacks)
*New applications also refresh the duration of the DoT
*After 15 stacks: DoT expires dealing ___ Disruptor Damage in a 1.25 km radius sphere around the target hitting up to 5 foes. Main target will be immune to this trait for 5 seconds
*30 seconds recharge time
obtained: *<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Legendary Negh'Var Intel Dreadnought Cruiser]]
basic: * Disruptor weapons deal damage by breaking the bonds of atoms. By attaching a wave of carefully tuned Disruptor energy to our Energy Weapons Systems we can introduce a resonating destabilization frequency to the molecular geometry of the target, past a stable point, leading to a cascade of sudden exothermic reactions in the shape of highly radiated explosions.

name: Devious Rerouting
short: +Max HP from EPG, when Shields Low.
detailed:
*When Average Shield Capacity below 25%, gain +10% Maximum Hull Capacity for 30 sec ''(scales with Exotic Particle Generators skill)''
* Once triggered, may not trigger again for 60 sec
obtained: * <span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Terran Somerville Scout Ship]]
basic: * You will automatically gain a significant boost to maximum Hull Capacity whenever your average Shield Capacity drops below 25%. The amount of Hull Capacity gained will scale with your Starship Exotic Particle Generator skill (up to a max of 500). This effect may only  be triggered during combat, and has a lockout period between triggers.

name: Digital Compilation
short: Defeated Foes create Chasing Plasma Dmg AOEs.
detailed: * Defeated Foes that have taken Exotic Damage from you transform into Digitizer Probes that chase Foes for 15 sec and deal ___ Plasma Damage per sec to Foes within 2.5km
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Compiler Science Dreadnought]]
basic: * Whenever an enemy of Frigate rank or higher is defeated after receiving [[Skill: Exotic Particle Generator|Exotic Damage]] from you, they will be transformed into a Digitizer Probe which will chase nearby enemies, dealing Plasma Damage to any that they are near.

name: Dimensional Modulation
short: Bonus Damage from nearby Foes.
detailed:
When Directed Energy Modulation, or any Miracle Worker Bridge Officer Ability is activated:
* To self, max once per 10 sec: +3 - 30% Bonus All Damage (based on number of targets within 5km, up to 10 max) with Starship Weapons for 10 sec.
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Terran Lexington Dreadnought Cruiser]]
basic: * Activating [[Directed Energy Modulation (ability)|Directed Energy Modulation]], or any [[Miracle Worker|Miracle Worker Bridge Officer Ability]], will grant you an amount of Bonus Weapon Damage that scales with the number of nearby foes within 5km (up to 10 max). This buff lasts 10 seconds, and may only trigger once every 10 seconds.

name: Directed Dilithium Burn
short: Chance for addt'l Plasma Damage on Foe Death.
detailed:
When you defeat a foe:
* 15% chance to deal 36,360 Plasma Damage in a 4km radius to all enemies
obtained: *<span class="veryrare" title="Very rare item" style="cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #303;">'''[Starship Trait: Directed Dilithium Burn]'''</span> from the [[Discovery: Emerald Chain Lock Box]] or the [[Infinity Prize Pack: Starship Trait]].
basic: * You have been trained to align your ship's scanning frequencies to trigger an additional "Miniature Burn Event" upon your enemy's destruction. Whenever you defeat a foe, there is a chance of igniting their dilithium reactor, causing an additional explosion at their location (allies are immune to that damage).

name: Directed Energy Flux
short: Dmg Buff to Rapid Fire and Beam Overload from Temp Op BOff Abilities and Directed Energy Modulation.
detailed:
* Directed Energy Modulation or a Temporal Operative BOff Ability grant:
** '''Directed Energy Flux'''
** Beam: Overload and Cannon: Rapid Fire gain 25% Bonus Damage for 15 sec
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Husnock Warship]]
basic: * While slotted, activating any [[Temporal Operative]] Bridge Officer Ability or the [[Directed Energy Modulation (ability)|Directed Energy Modulation]] Ability will grant +25% Bonus Damage of [[Cannons: Rapid Fire (ability)|Cannons: Rapid Fire]] and [[Beams: Overload (ability)|Beams: Overload]] for 15 sec.

name: Directional Bias
short: Dmg from Front gives +Exotic Dmg; Dmg from Back gives +Hull Healing and +Regen
detailed:
* When Damaged from Front: +5% Bonus Exotic Damage from Bridge Officer Abilities (max 10 stacks, once per sec)
* All "Front" stacks reset when activating Exotic Damage Bridge Officer Abilities
* When Damaged from Back: +1% Hull Regeneration and +5% Bonus Outgoing Hull Healing for Bridge Officer Abilities (max 10 stacks, once per sec)
* All "Back' stacks reset when activating Hull Healing Bridge Officer Abilities.
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Courage Command Science Destroyer]]
basic: * When damaged from the forward 180' arc, the energy will be redirected into the deflector dish, manifesting as increased Damage for Exotic Damage Bridge Officer Abilities. The stacks built up from incoming damage are expended and reset when activating your next Exotic Damage Bridge Officer Ability. When damaged from the reward 180' arc, a portion of the expended structural integrity field is reabsorbed as power that is spent on passive Hull Regeneration, or can be spent to increase the Healing from Bridge Officer Abilities. All built up bonuses are expended and reset when activating your next Hull Healing Bridge Officer Ability.

name: Dominion Coordination
short: Buffs hangar pet damage after activating Beam: Overload, Cannons: Rapid Fire or Surgical Strikes.
detailed:
(Activating [[Beam: Overload (ability)|Beam: Overload]], [[Energy Weapons: Surgical Strikes (ability)|Energy Weapons: Surgical Strikes]] and [[Cannons: Rapid Fire (ability)|Cannons: Rapid Fire]])
* +33% All Damage Bonus to all [[hangar pet]]s within 10km
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Jem'Hadar Dreadnought Carrier (T6)]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, activating [[Beam: Overload (ability)|Beam: Overload]], [[Energy Weapons: Surgical Strikes (ability)|Energy Weapons: Surgical Strikes]] and [[Cannons: Rapid Fire (ability)|Cannons: Rapid Fire]] will provide an increase in damage to all nearby hangar pets. This buff does not stack.

name: Down But Not Out
short: Max Subsystem Power Increases as Health Decreases.
detailed:
''(Note: No sources of +MaxPower stack; only the highest bonus will apply.)''
* Bonus starts at 80% Hull and reaches max potential at 20% Hull
* Up to 20 All Subsystem Power Max, increasing as Hull Percent decreases
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Kelvin Constitution Heavy Command Cruiser]] & [[Legendary Kelvin Constitution Intel Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> <span style="font-family:'FuturaBody', Tahoma, Geneva, Arial;" class="rare lht-data">[[[Starship Trait Unlock - Down But Not Out / Highly Specialized (Klingon)|<span class="rare">Starship Trait Unlock - Down But Not Out / Highly Specialized (Klingon)</span>]]]</span> ''(Retired)''
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> <span style="font-family:'FuturaBody', Tahoma, Geneva, Arial;" class="rare lht-data">[[[Starship Trait Unlock - Down But Not Out / Standoff (Romulan)|<span class="rare">Starship Trait Unlock - Down But Not Out / Standoff (Romulan)</span>]]]</span> ''(Retired)''
basic: * As your ship takes damage, you are able to reroute power from damaged systems to increase the maximum power potential of all of your subsystems, allowing a higher cap on your potential performance.

name: Eclectic Collector of Armaments
short: Bonuses per type of attack used
detailed:
Using different kinds of attacks each grants +10% Bonus Damage and +10% faster Recharge of Capital Ship Innate Weapons for 30 sec

Applicable weapon types:

* Beams
* Cannon
* Torpedoes
* Capital Ship Innate Weapons
* Universal Consoles
* Experimental Weapons
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Shrike Intel Juggernaut]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, dealing damage with different kinds of weapons provides stacking bonuses to all Damage and to the Recharge Rate of Capital Ship Innate weapons such as the arrays found on [[Juggernaut]]s and [[Dreadnought]]s.

name: Efficient Demolition
short: Subsystem Power from Defeating Foes.
detailed:
* On defeating Foe: Adds 5 Power to whichever Subsystem is lowest for 30 sec
* Subsequent activations of Efficient Demolition provide 10 Power instead for 10 sec
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Parliament Miracle Worker Surveyor Cruiser]]
basic: * Defeating Foes adds a small boost to the subsystem with the lowest power for a moderate duration, and for the next several seconds activations of Efficient Demolition provide an increased boost. Waste not, want not. Tidy destruction of stellar debris tends to involve the release of a fair amount of energy, and the ship has been modified to capture as much of it as possible.

name: Electrified Anomalies
short: Your BOff anomalies deal electrical damage & grant power boosts.
detailed:
Adds a severe electrical charge to your [[Bridge Officer]] anomalies.
* ____ Electrical Damage ''(ignores shields)'' each sec to foes within 5km of anomaly
* +__ All Power Levels to allies within 5km of anomaly
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Risian Weather Control Vessel]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, your Bridge Officer Anomalies become the epicenter of an electrical storm in addition to their other effects, causing electrical blasts to shoot out. These will deal significant damage to any foes and grant substantial power bonuses to any allies hit.

name: Emergency Response
short: -Hull and Shield Heal Recharge Time at low health. ''Passive''.
detailed:
* When taking damage at 50% or less hull strength:
** Self: -10% Recharge Time on Hull and Shield Healing Bridge Officer abilities ''(Can occur once every 4 seconds)''
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Kobali Samsar Cruiser]]
basic: * When you suffer damage at low health you have all of your Hull and Shield Heal bridge officer ability recharge times reduced slightly. This reduction can happen every few seconds and it cannot reduce an ability's recharge time below its group cooldown.

name: Emergency Response Teams
short: Secondary Shielding + buff on shield depletion.
detailed:
*When any shield facing becomes depleted: +____ Secondary Shields for 30 sec ''(Max once every 60 seconds)''
*While Secondary Shields Persist:
**When activating any Science or Intelligence Bridge Officer Ability:
***+____ Hitpoints
***+____ Shield Regeneration applied once to each facing
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Vulcan T'Pau Scout Ship]]
basic: * When any shield facing becomes depleted, you gain a significant amount of Secondary Shields for ~30 seconds. While the Secondary Shielding remains, activating any [[Bridge officer and kit abilities#Science Abilities|Science]] or [[Bridge officer and kit abilities#Intelligence Abilities|Intel]] abilities heal your hull and shields.

name: Emergency Weapon Cycle
short: On Emergency Power to Weapons: -Weapon Power Cost, +Weapon Firing Speed.
detailed:
* On Emergency Power to Weapons:
** -50% Weapon Power Cost for 30 sec
** 20% Firing Cycle Haste for Energy Weapons for 30 sec
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Arbiter Battlecruiser]] & [[Legendary Avenger Miracle Worker Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Kurak Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Morrigu Heavy Warbird]] & [[Legendary Valdore Temporal Ops Strike Wing Escort Warbird]]
basic: * Upon activating [[Emergency Power to Weapons]], you gain a reduction in weapon power cost and a bonus to weapon firing speed for the duration of the Emergency Power.

name: Emitter Synergy
short: +Shield Heal, +Exotic Damage after using Tac or Intel Bridge Officer ability.
detailed:
When using Tac or Intel Bridge Office Ability:
* +7.5% Exotic Damage for 15 sec (Stacks up to 3 times)
* +7.5% to Shield Heals for 15 sec (Stacks up to 3 times)
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Scryer Intel Science Vessel]]
basic: * Each time you use a [[Bridge officer and kit abilities#Tactical Abilities|Tactical]] or [[Bridge officer and kit abilities#Intelligence Abilities|Intelligence]] Bridge Officer ability you gain a small bonus to both [[Exotic damage|Exotic Damage]] and Shield Healing. This bonus stacks up to 3 times.

name: Energy Monopoly
short: Aceton Beam and Overwhelm Regulators drain power.
detailed:
Using Aceton Beam and Overwhelm Regulators:
*to target: -_ All Power Levels for 10 sec
*to self: +_ All Power Levels for 10 sec
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Ferengi Quark Marauder]]
basic: * Using [[Aceton Beam (ability)|Aceton Beam]] or [[Overwhelm Power Regulators (ability)|Overwhelm Power Regulators]] causes you to drain power from your target into your own sub-systems for a short time.

name: Energy Overdrive
short: Movement and Beam Damage from Beam Firing Modes.
detailed:
On activating Beams: Overload, Fire at Will, Exceed Rated Limits:
* +100% Flight Speed for 10 sec
* +100% Turn Rate for 10 sec
* +10% - 50% All Damage with Energy Weapons for 10 sec
** Damage based on proximity to target (max at 1km, min at 5km)
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Da Vinci Miracle Worker Escort]]
basic: * Activating [[Beams: Overload (ability)|Beams: Overload]], [[Beams: Fire at Will (ability)|Beams: Fire at Will]], [[Energy Weapons: Exceed Rated Limits (ability)|Energy Weapons: Exceed Rated Limits]] will increase Energy Weapon Damage, Speed and Turn Rate. The percentage Energy Weapon Damage increase is based on proximity to your target, reaching its maximum at 1km and scaling down to its minimum at a distance of 5km or more.

name: Energy Web
short: Physical DoT, Hold on Beam: Overload, Cannons: Rapid Fire or Surgical Strikes.
detailed:
Activating Beam: Overload, Surgical Strikes or Cannons: Rapid Fire applies '''''Energy Web''''':
* Foe: Deals _ Physical Damage every 0.5 sec for 6 sec (Ignores Shields)
* Foe: Holds target for 3 sec
* Can be used every 45 seconds
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Tholian Tarantula Dreadnought Cruiser]]
basic: * Activation of [[Beams: Overload (ability)|Beams: Overload]], [[Energy Weapons: Surgical Strikes (ability)|Energy Weapons: Surgical Strikes]] or [[Cannons: Rapid Fire (ability)|Cannons: Rapid Fire]] will empower your next attack, causing your foe to be trapped in an Energy Web. Enemies trapped in the Energy Web will suffer heavy shield penetrating physical damage over time and be held briefly. This ability's damage is improved by [[Auxiliary Power|Auxiliary power]] and [[Skill: Exotic Particle Generator|Exotic Particle Generator]] skill. Energy Web can be triggered once every 45 seconds.

name: Enhanced Cloaking Integration
short: Buffs when entering/exiting cloak.
detailed:
*When Entering Cloak:
**+100% Turn Rate and Flight Speed for 8 sec (or until Exiting Cloak)
**Restore +4% Max Hull per sec for 8 sec (or until Exiting Cloak)
*When Exiting Cloak:
**+__% Firing Cycle Haste for Energy Weapons for 8 sec (scales with Aux Power)
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Janeway Command Science Vessel]]
basic: * Your ship's systems have been tuned to grant additional benefits when entering and exiting [[cloak]]. Entering cloak will restore Hull over time and boost maneuverability, while exiting will grant a burst of Firing Cycle [[Haste]] for Directed [[ship weapon|Energy Weaponry]]. This works with any cloaking device variant.

name: Enhanced Nanite Regeneration
short: +Regen from self heals.
detailed:
* When using a captain or bridge officer heal on yourself, enables '''Regenerative Nanites''' for 15 sec
* '''Regenerative Nanites''' grants 25-125% of Maximum Hull regenerated per minute ''(Currently 25%)''
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Liberated Borg Command Juggernaut]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, when you activate a Captain or Bridge Officer Heal on yourself, you will gain a significant boost to hull regeneration for a short duration. This boost will increase in value the more hull your starship is missing. This buff will not stack.

name: Enhanced Power Condensers
short: Energy Siphon or Tachyon Beam: Self +Max Shield HP, +Max Power.
detailed:
Using Energy Siphon or Tachyon Beam applies ''Enhanced Power Condensers'':
* to self: +5 Max All Power Subsystems (does not stack with other Max increases) for 15 sec
* to self: +10% Maximum Shield Capacity for 15 sec
* Locks out ''Enhanced Power Condensers'' for 30 sec
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Breen Rezreth Dreadnought Cruiser]]
basic: * Using [[Energy Siphon (ability)|Energy Siphon]] or [[Tachyon Beam (ability)|Tachyon Beam]] will provide you with a boost to maximum power levels and provide a boost to maximum shield hit points for a short time. Enhanced Power Condensers can be triggered once every 30 seconds.

name: Entwined Tactical Matrices
short: Links Energy and Torpedo firing modes together.
detailed:
*When activating Torpedo Spread:
**Applies Fire at Will I and Scatter Volley I to self
*When activating Fire at Will or Scatter Volley:
**Applies Torpedo Spread I to self
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Gagarin Miracle Worker Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Qugh Miracle Worker Battlecruiser]]
basic: * Activating [[Beams: Fire at Will (ability)|Beams: Fire at Will]] or [[Cannons: Scatter Volley (ability)|Cannons: Scatter Volley]] causes your next torpedo attack to be a [[Torpedoes: Spread (ability)|Torpedoes: Spread]]. Activating Torpedo Spread causes you to gain Beams: Fire at Will and Cannons: Scatter Volley for a short duration.

name: Evasion Specialist
short: Pilot BOff abilities and EPtE grant Shield Regen and Hardness.
detailed:
* Using Emergency Power to Engines or any Pilot Bridge Officer Ability:
** + ____ Shield Regeneration for 5 sec
** Reduces Damage to Shields by 20% for 5 sec
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Reliant Advanced Light Cruiser]]
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Miranda Multi-Mission Cruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[QeHpu' Advanced Light Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Deleth Advanced Light Warbird Battlecruiser]]
basic: * Upon activation of [[Emergency Power to Engines (ability)|Emergency Power to Engines]], or any [[Pilot (specialization)#Bridge Officer Abilities|Pilot]] Bridge Officer Ability, gain Shield Hardness and Shield Regeneration for 5 sec (once per 15 sec max).

name: Exitus Acta Probat
short: Intel Abilities and Jam Sensors give buffs.
detailed:
When activating any Intelligence Bridge Officer ability or Jam Sensors:
* +500 Stealth (+[[Stealth#Stealth Bonus|Stealth Bonus]] / 10) for 20 sec
* +15% Bonus Weapon Damage for 20 sec
* +40 Starship Control Expertise for 20 sec
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Section 31 Intel Science Destroyer]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> <span style="font-family:'FuturaBody', Tahoma, Geneva, Arial;" class="rare lht-data">[[[Starship Trait: Exitus Acta Probat (Klingon)|<span class="rare">Starship Trait: Exitus Acta Probat (Klingon)</span>]]]</span> ''(Retired)''
basic: * Activating any [[Bridge officer and kit abilities#Intelligence Abilities|Intelligence Ability]] or [[Jam Sensors (ability)|Jam Sensors]] will increase your [[Stealth]], [[Skill: Control Expertise|Control Expertise]], and Weapon Damage for a short duration.

name: Exotic Modulation
short: Directed Energy Modulation and Temporal Operative abilities grant +Exotic Damage
detailed:
*Upon activating [[Directed Energy Modulation (ability)|Directed Energy Modulation]] or any [[Temporal Operative]] ability:
** +20% Bonus Exotic Damage for 15 sec
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Chronos Temporal Dreadnought Cruiser]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, using [[Directed Energy Modulation (ability)|Directed Energy Modulation]] or any [[Temporal Operative]] ability will provide a large boost to Exotic Damage for a short time.

name: Exotic Particle Shielding
short: +All Damage Resistance Rating and +Exotic Damage Resistance.
detailed:
* When using Engineering Team, Science Team or Tactical Team:
** Self: +9 All Damage Resistance Rating for 15 sec ''(Stacks up to 3 times)''
** Self: +9 Exotic Damage Resistance Rating for 15 sec ''(Stacks up to 3 times)''
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Esquiline Multi-Mission Strategic Explorer|''Esquiline-class'' Multi-Mission Strategic Explorer]]
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Caelian Intel Multi-Mission Explorer]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Ihgomas Multi-Mission Strategic Vessel|''Ihgomas-class'' Multi-Mission Strategic Vessel]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Taenen Strategic Explorer Warbird|''Taenen-class'' Strategic Explorer Warbird]]
basic: *Each time you use [[Engineering Team (ability)|Engineering Team]], [[Science Team (ability)|Science Team]] or [[Tactical Team (ability)|Tactical Team]] you gain a moderate buff to All [[Skill:_Hull_Plating|Damage Resistance Rating]] and [[Damage_type_(space)#Exotic_damage|Exotic Damage abilities]]. This buff stacks up to 3 times.

name: Explosive Polarity Shift
short: Explosion when Reverse Shield Polarity ends.
detailed:
* When Reverse Shield Polarity duration ends:
** ______ Kinetic Damage (100% Shield Penetration) to foes within 3 km (Damage increased by 5% per stack of Polarity Shift)
* When damaged while Reverse Shield Polarity is active:
** Apply 1 stack of Polarity Shift (max once per 0.5sec)
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Andromeda Exploration Cruiser]]
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Galaxy Dreadnought Cruiser]]
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Ross Command Exploration Cruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Negh'Tev Heavy Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[D'Khellra Warbird Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Legendary D'deridex Miracle Worker Warbird Battlecruiser]]
basic: * While [[Reverse Shield Polarity (ability)|Reverse Shield Polarity]] is active, incoming damage will build stacks of ''Polarity Shift''. When Reverse Shield Polarity ends, nearby foes will be dealt severe kinetic damage (increased by stacks of ''Polarity Shift'').

name: Extensively Modified Warp Core
short: Full Impulse and Quantum Slipstream perform better.
detailed:
* +30 Flight Speed during Full Impulse
* +125 Inertia during Full Impulse
* +25 Turn Speed during Full Impulse
* Bonuses linger after exiting Full Impulse for 15 sec
* Significantly improved Flight Speed and Turn Speed during Quantum Slipstream
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Intrepid Miracle Worker Multi-Mission Science Vessel]]
basic: * Improves Flight Speed and Turn Speed during [[Full Impulse (ability)|Full Impulse]] and [[Quantum Slipstream Drive (ability)|Quantum Slipstream Drive]]. Bonus lingers for a moderate duration after Full Impulse ends.

name: Field-Modified Overload Support
short: Hull Heals recharge BO and EPtW.
detailed: * Your Hull Heals that Target your ship recharge [[Beams: Overload (ability)|Beams: Overload]] and [[Emergency Power to Weapons (ability)|Emergency Power to Weapons]] up to their minimum cooldown.
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Columbia Temporal Operative Escort]]
basic: * Activating Hull Heals recharges Beam Overload and Emergency Power to Weapons up to their minimum cooldown.

name: Fiery Entrance
short: Narrow Sensor Bands or launching pets causes fire damage.
detailed:
*When you activate Narrow Sensor Bands or launch Hangar Pets, to foes within 3km:
** ____ Fire Damage
** 20% chance: to confuse for X sec
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Fek'Ihri Fe'rang Dreadnought Carrier]]
basic: * Activating [[Narrow Sensor Bands (ability)|Narrow Sensor Bands]] or launching [[Hangar Pet]]s will cause your ship to pulse waves of fire around it, with a chance to confuse any enemies affected.

name: Five Magicks
short: Damage from the Five Magicks provides bonuses
detailed:
When dealing Damage with any of the Five Magicks (Fire, Cold, Electrical, Radiation and Psionic), apply the following for 15 sec:
* +5 Current Engine Power per sec
* +15% Bonus Damage to the Five Magicks and Disruptor (15% + 0.15% per Engine Power)
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Hysperian Intel Battlecruiser]]
basic: * Dealing Fire, Cold, Electrical, Psionic, or Radiation to Foes boosts current Engine Power levels per sec for 15 sec and grants bonus Disruptor, Fire, Cold, Electrical, Psionic, and Radiation Damage based on Engine Power.

name: Flagship Staffing
short: Command and Healing Powers Reset Firing Modes, Grant Weapon Haste
detailed:
*To allied targets of any Command, Hull Healing or Shield Healing Bridge Officer ability:
*Reset Cooldowns on non-Spec Firing Modes (not below Shared Cooldowns)
*33% Firing Cycle Haste for Energy Weapons for 10 sec
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Ahwahnee Command Carrier]]
basic: *Using a Command, Hull Heal or Shield Heal Bridge Officer Ability on an Ally or Allies resets the cooldown of all non-Specialization firing modes for Beams, Cannons, and Torpedoes. It also provides that target a temporary increase to their Weapon Firing Cycle. This effect has a moderate internal cooldown.

name: Formation Flying
short: Distress calls add Synth Destroyers.
detailed: * Distress calls summon two Synth Destroyers for 30 sec.
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Deimos Pilot Destroyer]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, activating any [[Beacons_and_decoys#Distress_beacon|distress call]] will summon a pair of Synth Destroyers that fight alongside you for a short duration, devastating the nearby area with phaser beams. They have an [[Immolating Phaser Lance (ability)|Immolating Phaser Lance]] that's synchronized with your firing control, activating it whenever and wherever you do.

name: Frontal Assault
short: +Shield Hardness, +Shield Regen when using Cannon Abilities.
detailed:
* Activating Cannon-enhancing ability ([[Ability: Cannons: Rapid Fire|Rapid Fire]], [[Ability: Cannon: Scatter Volley|Scatter Volley]], [[Ability: Energy Weapons: Surgical Strikes|Surgical Strikes]], etc.) grants:
** +___ Shield Regeneration per second to front Arc
** Reduces damage to Shields by 16.7%
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Vaadwaur Manasa Assault Escort]]
basic: *Activating Cannon abilities will provide a boost to your frontal shield hardness and regeneration rate for a short time.

name: Gelatinous Membrane
short: Hull Heals and Miracle Worker BOff Abilities grant Phys/Kinetic Resist + Reflect
detailed: * Activating Hull Healing or Miracle Worker Abilities grants to the target (or self) +80 Physical and Kinetic Damage Resistance Rating and Reflect 25% Physical and Kinetic Damage (pre-resist) back at Attacker for 10 sec
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Cnidarian Defender]]
basic:
* Activating any Hull Healing Bridge Officer Ability, or any Miracle Worker Bridge Officer Ability that targets yourself or an ally, grants the target of that ability the "Gelatinous Membrane" effect for a short duration. While active, this effect reflects a portion of any Physical and Kinetic Damage they receive back at the owner of that damage (pre-resist values), while also granting an increase to their Physical and Kinetic Damage Resistance Rating. This effect cannot be stacked, but will instead be refreshed by subsequent applications.
* Note that not all sources of damage may be reflected, such as those that originate from indirect sources such as some Anomalies, Hazards, or Mines.

name: Go for the Kill
short: Critical Hits extend duration of Rapid Fire.
detailed:
* Critical hits increase duration of Cannons: Rapid Fire by 3 seconds
* ''(Can occur once every 5 seconds)''
obtained:
*<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Jem'Hadar Recon Ship]]
*<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Jem'Hadar Strike Ship]]
*<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Legendary Jem'Hadar Vanguard Pilot Attack Ship]]
basic: *Landing a critical hit while [[Cannons: Rapid Fire (ability)|Cannons: Rapid Fire]] is active will extend its duration by a small amount. This can occur once every few seconds.

name: Going the Extra Mile
short: Heals are more effective and can add Hull Capacity.
detailed:
Going the Extra Mile/Improved/Superior
* +10/15/20% increased Shield and Hull Healing.
* If healed target is at or above 90% Hull:
** +10/15/20% Maximum Hit Points for 20 sec (does not stack)
obtained:
*<u>Going the Extra Mile</u>: 15 points spent into the [[Miracle Worker specialization]].
*<u>Improved Going the Extra Mile</u>: 30 points spent into the Miracle Worker specialization.
*<u>Superior Going the Extra Mile</u>: [[Temporal Agent Recruitment|Temporal Agent]] account-wide reward after spending 30 points in 3 primary specializations.
basic: * Improves the effectiveness of your Captain and Bridge Officer Heals. Additionally, if you heal someone while they are above 90% Maximum Hull, they additionally gain a boost to Maximum [[Skill: Hull Capacity|Hull Capacity]] for a short duration.

name: Good Day to Die
short: Incoming Damage causes +Damage, +Incoming Healing.
detailed:
Once per second, when damaged:
* +1.5% Bonus All Damage for 10 sec
* +5% Incoming Healing for 10 sec
* ''(Effects stack up to 10 times)''
obtained: *<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Legendary Vor'cha Command Support Battlecruiser]]
basic: * Once per second when you are damaged, you will gain a boost to outgoing damage and incoming healing. This boost stacks up to 10 times.

name: Gravitational Nexus
short: Maneuverability, Exotic, and Projectile Buffs in area near Anomalies
detailed:
Creates a Artificial Gravitational Nexus for 30 sec, once per 45 sec max. Allies within 5km of the Nexus gain:
* +20% Flight Speed and Turn Rate
* +20% Bonus All Damage with Exotic Damage Abilities
* +20% Bonus All Damage with Projectile Weaponry
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Kelvin Timeline Constitution II Intel Cruiser]]
basic:
*Adapted from the complex gravitational technology used at Yorktown Station, this artificial nexus can generate gravitational eddies to aid in the flight of starships, projectiles, and exotic particles that are attuned to the gravitational fields being generated.
:Activating any Bridge Officer Anomaly ability will simultaneously deploy an Artificial Gravitational Nexus at the location of the target. Allies within 5km of this Nexus will receive increased Flight Speed and Maneuverability, as well as Bonus Damage with Exotic Damage Abilities, and Projectile Weapons.
:This buff extends to the 24 allies nearest to the Nexus in the affected area, including summoned allies, hangar pets, targetable torpedoes, and mines.

name: Gravitic Entanglement
short: Energy Weapon AOE abilities cause Foes to attract eachother.
detailed:
* While Beam: Fire at Will or Cannon: Scatter Volley are active, Foes hit by your Energy Weapons are pulled together if within 5km of eachother
* If attracted to another Foe that is within 0.5km, cause ____ Kinetic Damage instead of being pulled (max once per 5 sec, per target)
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Terran Acheron Dreadnought Carrier]]
basic: * While under the effects of [[Beams: Fire at Will (ability)|Beams: Fire at Will]] or [[Cannons: Scatter Volley (ability)|Cannons: Scatter Volley]], foes hit by your Energy Weapons will attract one another at random. The gravitic attraction will target a Foe far away if possible. If the only valid targets are in close proximity, the gravitational resonance will cause a small kinetic explosion instead of pulling the ships toward one another. If an enemy ship causes one of these explosions, it cannot do so again for several seconds.

name: Gravitic Inversion
short: Creates 3 Gravtic Inversions + Pulls up to 5 enemies + Slow + Radiation Damage
detailed:
When using an enemy targeting Bridge Officer Engineering or Command ability your ship creates three Gravitic Inversion at points around the ship which:
*Draws enemies to epicenter
*___ Radiation Damage per sec
*__% Turn Rate
*__% Flight Speed
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Promellian Command Battlecruiser]]
basic:
* With their expertise in gravitics, the [[ma:Promellian|<span style="cursor: help;" title="Promellian at Memory Alpha">Promellian</span>]]'s managed to create a device which generated Gravitic Inversions at three points around the ship. 
:This trait is triggered by the use of an enemy targeting [[Bridge Officer]] [[Engineering]] or [[Command]] ability and each of these inversions quickly draw up to 5 ships into their center. Slow them considerably and do radiation damage within a 5km Sphere for each second the inversions remain. 
:Once used this trait has a 45 second cooldown before it can be triggered again.

name: Gre'thor's Fire
short: Launching pets adds fire damage to weapons.
detailed:
When you launch hangar pets:
*Your weapons deal an additional __ fire damage per volley
*Your weapons gain 2.5% chance: __ fire damage per sec for 15 sec ''(ignores shields)''
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Fek'Ihri Gok'tad Carrier]]
basic: * When you launch hangar pets, your weapons deal additional fire damage on hit for several seconds. This fire damage increases based on the target's missing hitpoints.

name: Greater Than The Sum
short: Emergency to Aux or Command Boff abilities grant bonuses.
detailed:
When Emergency to Aux or Command abilities are used:
* To Self and up to 10 Allies within 5km, for 10 sec:
** +2 - 20 All Power Levels (based on number of targets)
** Restore 0.5% - 3% of Max Hull and Max Shields each sec (based on number of targets)
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Clarke Multi-Mission Command Cruiser]] & [[Legendary Miranda Multi-Mission Cruiser]]
basic: * Activating [[Emergency Power to Auxiliary (ability)|Emergency Power to Auxiliary]], or any [[Command Bridge Officer Ability]], will provide a bonus to yourself and allies within 5km which increases All Subsystem Power, Hull Regeneration, and Shield Regeneration for 10 seconds. The effectiveness of this increase scales up with the number of allies affected, up to a max of 10 (including self). This effect may only be triggered once every 10 seconds.

name: Greedy Emitters
short: Power Bonus, Drain Immunity, -Weapon Cost after using Energy Siphon, Tachyon Beam or Tyken's Rift.
detailed:
* Activating Energy Siphon, Tachyon Beam or Tyken's Rift:
** Immunity against energy drain for 10 sec
** -(??)% [[Weapon Power Cost|energy weapons power costs]] for 10 sec
** +?? Bonus subsystem power levels for 10 sec
** ''(once every 30 seconds)''
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Ferengi Nandi Warship]]
basic: *Using the [[Energy Siphon (ability)|Energy Siphon]], [[Tachyon Beam (ability)|Tachyon Beam]], or [[Tyken's Rift (ability)|Tyken's Rift]] Science Bridge Officer Abilities gives a buff which grants immunity to energy drain, reduces energy weapons power usage, and increases your subsystem power levels for 10 seconds. This buff may be triggered once every 30 seconds.

name: Harasser Mines
short: Weapon Modes Summon Mines.
detailed:
* Directed Energy Weapons create 1 level __ Chroniton Mine within 1.5km of each target's location:
** ______ Kinetic Damage (20% Shield Penetration) per mine
** Can occur once every 20 seconds
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Vorgon Xyfius Heavy Escort]]
basic: * When either [[Cannons: Scatter Volley (ability)|Cannons: Scatter Volley]] or [[Beams: Fire at Will (ability)|Beams: Fire at Will]] is active, your directed energy weapons will trigger a Chroniton Mine to appear within 1.5km of each target affected by the initial activation of either Cannon: Scatter Volley or Beam: Fire at Will. This can occur once every 20 seconds.

name: Harmonic Distribution
short: Exotic Particle Generators and Recharge Time on Universal Consoles from High Shield Pct
detailed:
* While Shields are above 50%, Universal Console ability cooldowns are 25% faster.
* +0 Starship Exotic Particle Generator (scales based on your current shield percentage)
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Aetherian Harmony]]
basic: * While your total shield capacity is above 50% you gain Exotic Particle Generators Skill and Universal Console ability cooldowns are 25% faster. The amount of Exotic Particle Generators Skill is equal to current average shield percent above 50% (ie, if your average shield percent across all facings is currently 80%, you will gain a 30% Exotic Particle Generators Skill increase). This benefit is re-evaluated once per second.

name: Harrying Maneuvers
short: EPtE or Pilot abilities grant Accuracy, Penetration, and SS Offline proc.
detailed:
When Emergency Power to Engines or Pilot abilities are used, once per 20 sec, for 6 sec:
* +50 Accuracy Rating
* +10 Weapon Armor Penetration
* +10% Weapon Shield Penetration
* Once per second: 20% chance of One Random Subsystem Offline for ~6 sec
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Denorios-class Bajoran Interceptor]]
basic: * Activating [[Emergency Power to Engines (ability)|Emergency Power to Engines]] or any [[Pilot (specialization)#Bridge Officer Abilities|Pilot]] Bridge Officer Ability will temporarily grant you a major increase to [[Accuracy]] Rating along with bonuses to [[Skill: Shield Penetration|Shield Penetration]] and [[Skill: Hull Penetration|Hull Penetration]]. In addition to these bonuses, your weapons gain a chance to render one [[Subsystem]] Offline at random once per second. This bonus may only be gained once every several seconds.

name: Heard I Needed Help
short: When low Hull, Heals and Intel abilities call Kelvin Timeline Self.
detailed:
* When below 50% Hull, using Hull Heals or [[Specialization: Intelligence Officer|Intel Abilities]] calls a version of your ship from the [[Kelvin Timeline]] to assist for 60 sec
