* In addition to weapons fire, it uses [[Ability: Deploy Construction Shuttle Wing|Construction Shuttle Wing]], [[Ability: Delayed Overload Cascade|Delayed Overload Cascade]], and [[Ability: Augment Boarding Party|Augment Boarding Party]]
* After it arrives, there is a 120 sec recharge before it can help again.
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Kelvin Constitution Intel Battlecruiser]]
basic: * Activating Hull Heal or Intel Abilities when below half Hull calls the Kelvin Timeline version of your starship to help briefly. It is equipped with Construction Shuttle Wing, Delayed Overload Cascade, and Augment Boarding Party.

name: Heart of Sol
short: AP:Beta and Temp OP Abilities grant +Damage, Haste.
detailed:
[[Attack Pattern Beta (ability)|Attack Pattern Beta]] or any [[Temporal Operative (specialization)#Temporal Operatives|Temporal Operative BOff Ability]]:
*10% Firing Cycle Haste for Energy Weapons for 20 sec
*+5% Bonus Phaser Damage for 20 sec
obtained:
<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Federation]] characters owning:
* [[Edison Temporal Warship]]
* [[Jem'Hadar Vanguard Temporal Warship]]
* [[Kholhr Temporal Warbird]]
* [[Chargh Temporal Warship]]
basic: * When activating Attack Pattern: Beta or any Temporal Operative Boff Ability, you will gain a boost to Energy Weapon Haste and Directed Energy Phaser Weapon Damage for a short duration.

name: Heavy Tachyon Mine
short: Weapon Modes deploy Heavy Tachyon Mine.
detailed:
* Directed Energy Weapon Modes deploy 1 level 61 Heavy Tachyon Mine at your location:
** ____ Kinetic Damage 
** Increases damage to shields from all energy types by 10% for 10 sec
** -____ All Shields
** Creates a Tachyon Particle Cloud (with 2km radius) upon death:
*** -___ All Shields every 0.5 Sec
** Can occur once every 30 seconds
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Palatine Multi-Mission Reconnaissance Explorer]]
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Caelian Intel Multi-Mission Explorer]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Khaimas Multi-Mission Reconnaissance Vessel]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Surhuelh Reconnaissance Explorer Warbird]]
basic: *Activating [[Beams: Overload (ability)|Beams: Overload]], [[Beams: Fire at Will (ability)|Beams: Fire at Will]], [[Cannons: Rapid Fire (ability)|Cannons: Rapid Fire]], [[Cannons: Scatter Volley (ability)|Cannons: Scatter Volley]] or any [[Subsystem Targeting]] ability  will cause your starship to deploy a Heavy Tachyon Mine behind your ship. This large mine is easier for your enemies to see than smaller mines, but it has a larger tracking distance and a larger area of effect. Upon impact, this mine will cause high kinetic damage (with 100% shield penetration) in a 3km area and will leave behind a Tachyon Particle Hazard that will heavily damage shields to any foe that remains within it. Unlike normal mine explosions, the Heavy Tachyon Mine's explosion will not harm the starship that deploys it. Additionally, if the Mine is destroyed by an enemy, it will still explode causing damage as normal.

name: Hellbore Light
short: Additional Shield Drain and Damage under Beams: Overload and Cannons: Rapid Fire
detailed:
While under the effects of [[Beams: Overload (ability)|Beams: Overload]] and [[Cannons: Rapid Fire (ability)|Cannons: Rapid Fire]], your energy weapons apply ''Hellbore Light'' to foes for 10 sec:
*When taking Directed Energy weapon damage from any source, drain 5% of Max Shields (max 10,000 drain per hit)
*If Shields are depleted while under this effect, trigger a 2.5km radius explosion dealing __,___ Plasma Damage to Foes near target
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Warden Temporal Multi-Mission Cruiser]]
basic: * The Hellbore Light Starship Trait adds an additional weapon fire to your attacks while you are under the effects of Beams: Overload or Cannons: Rapid Fire. When firing directed energy weapons and under the effects of those modes, a Hellbore Light is also launched which applies the Hellbore debuff to an enemy that it hits. Dealing directed energy weapon damage to enemies affected by Hellbore drains all of their shield facings. If a shield facing fails in this way, an additional explosion ignites and deals plasma damage to enemies within 2.5km of the affected ship and removes the Hellbore debuff.

name: Hexgrid Shield Focusing
short: Redistributing Shields grants Critical Severity
detailed: * Manually redistributing shields grants +__% Critical Severity based on Forward Shield Capacity for 30 sec (Max +35% at 60,000 Shield Capacity)
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Protostar Temporal Science Spearhead]]
basic: * Manually redistributing shields grants Critical Severity based on the total capacity of the forward Shields, up to a cap of 60,000 forward Shields.

name: Highly Specialized
short: Specialist Cooldown Bonus and Skill Boosts.
detailed:
When activating Specialist Bridge Officer ability:
* -5% Recharge Time on all Specialist Bridge Officer abilities
* +10 Starship Hull Restoration ''(Improves Hull Healing)'' for 20 sec ''(Stacks up to 5 times)''
* +10 Starship Weapon Specialization ''(Improves Critical Hit Chance with Weapons)'' for 20 sec ''(Stacks up to 5 times)''
* +10 Starship Exotic Particle Generator ''(Improves Exotic Damage)'' for 20 sec ''(Stacks up to 5 times)''
obtained:
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Kelvin Timeline T'laru Intel Carrier Warbird]]
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> <span style="font-family:'FuturaBody', Tahoma, Geneva, Arial;" class="rare lht-data">[[[Starship Trait Unlock - Standoff / Highly Specialized (Federation)|<span class="rare">Starship Trait Unlock - Standoff / Highly Specialized (Federation)</span>]]]</span> ''(Retired)''
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> <span style="font-family:'FuturaBody', Tahoma, Geneva, Arial;" class="rare lht-data">[[[Starship Trait Unlock - Down But Not Out / Highly Specialized (Klingon)|<span class="rare">Starship Trait Unlock - Down But Not Out / Highly Specialized (Klingon)</span>]]]</span> ''(Retired)''
basic: *Make the most of your bridge officer [[Officer_Training_School#Specialization_Qualifications|specialists]]! Each time one of their abilities is activated, it will cause all other specialist bridge officer abilities to recharge more quickly, allowing them all to be used more frequently. In addition, you will gain a boost to Starship [[Skill: Hull Restoration|Hull Repair]], Starship [[Skill: Weapon Specialization|Weapon Specialization]] and Starship [[Skill: Exotic Particle Generator|Particle Generators]] skills. This skill buff stacks up to 5 times.

name: History Will Remember
short: +Dmg, +MaxHP, +Regen (Stacking, Once per Foe).
detailed:
* For each Foe that damages you, gain 1 stack of ''History Will Remember'' (30 stacks max) which grants the following until you leave the map: 
** +1% All Damage
** +1% Hull Regen
** Increased Maximum Hull by 1%
** +10% Threat Generation ''(only when Threatening Stance is active)''
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Ambassador Intel Support Cruiser]]
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Narendra Support Cruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Legendary Vor'cha Command Support Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Vor'ral Support Battlecruiser]]
basic: * Prolonged conflicts become more desperate - and more heroic - as time wears on, and only those ships and crews with the fortitude to withstand such onslaughts are remembered in the annals of history. With this trait slotted, each Foe that damages you will grant you a stack of ''History Will Remember'', which imparts increased weapon damage, hull capacity, and hull regeneration. Each foe only counts for a single stack, no matter how many times they damage you. Each stack will last until you leave the map, and you may have up to 30 stacks maximum. Stacks may only be gained a maximum of once per second.

name: Hit and Run
short: Evasive Maneuvers grants +Res and +Dmg, +Crit Severity on Expire.
detailed:
* Self: +75 All Damage Resistance Rating during Evasive Maneuvers
* Upon Evasive Maneuvers expiration:
** Self: +20% Bonus All Damage for 8 sec
** Self: +30% Critical Severity for 8 sec
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Caitian Shikaris Escort]]

name: Honored Dead
short: +DmgRes, +Regen from Incoming Damage.
detailed:
* After receiving 10,000 Cumulative Damage, gain a stack of ''Honored Dead'' which adds +10 All Damage Resistance Rating and +1% Hull Regeneration (max 20 stacks, infinite duration)
* While at 20 stacks, subsequent activations instead grant 10,000 Temporary Hit Points for 40 sec
* While not in Combat, lose one stack of ''Honored Dead'' every 2 seconds unless Cloaked.
obtained:
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span><span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Sarcophagus Dreadnought Carrier]]
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> <span style="font-family:'FuturaBody', Tahoma, Geneva, Arial;" class="veryrare lht-data">[[[Starship Mastery Unlock: Honored Dead|<span class="veryrare">Starship Mastery Unlock: Honored Dead</span>]]]</span> ''(Retired)''
basic: *In times of war, the honored dead will serve as your shield. As your [[Hull]] is depleted in [[Space combat|combat]], the casualties you suffer will be added to the defensive capabilities of your vessel, resulting in stacking benefits to [[Damage resistance]] and passive [[Skill: Damage Control|Hull Regeneration]]. Once you reach maximum stacks of this, additional [[Damage type (space)|damage]] will instead grant a small amount of Temporary Hit Points. Stacks diminish outside of combat unless [[cloak]]ed.

name: Hunter's Instinct

obtained:
*<u>Hunter's Instinct</u>: account-wide unlock after 1 Ambush kill as a [[Klingon Recruitment#Hunter's Instinct|Klingon Recruit]].
*<u>Improved Hunter's Instinct</u>: account-wide unlock after 1000 Ambush kills as a [[Klingon Recruitment|Klingon Recruit]].
basic:
* [[Cloaking]] within a few seconds of destroying a Foe [[Placate]]s nearby Foes. Weapon damage during the Ambush effect that occurs after Cloaking reduces Target Damage Resistance for several seconds.
* Experienced hunters mask their approach, and a warp core breach can hide a cloaking starship when it's most vulnerable. Good instincts are priceless.

* (After use Load Viral Torpedo is put on cooldown for 10 sec)
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Benthan Assault Cruiser]]
basic: * [[Ability: Engineering Team|Engineering]], [[Ability: Science Team|Science]], [[Ability: Tactical Team|Tactical]] and [[Intelligence Team (ability)|Intelligence Team]] now load a Viral Torpedo. This causes your next Torpedo attack to disable your target(s) for a short period of time. This can occur once every 20 seconds.

name: Logic of Battle
short: Science or Intel BOff Ability = Debuff Enemy + 5 Second Invulnerability
detailed:
* Immunity to damage for 5 sec
* To Foe: Disabled for _ sec
* -__ All Damage (only vs. User) for _ sec
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Suurok Intel Science Destroyer]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, activating any Intelligence Ability or Bridge Officer Ability will disable your target for a few seconds and provide you with a brief boost of invulnerability.

name: Lost in Time
short: +HP, -Cooldowns when reduced to low hull.
detailed:
When reduced below 25% Hull:
* Heals for ________ over 3 sec
* Heals shields for _______ over 3 sec
* -50% Recharge to Bridge Officer and Captain Abilities over 3 sec
* Unkillable for 3 sec
* ''(Max once per 180 seconds)''
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Ambassador Intel Support Cruiser]]
basic: * When your health drops below a certain health percentage, your ship becomes partially displaced with time, and reverts to a state when its abilities were more readied and its defenses were in a better state. This can only occur once per 3 minutes.

name: Lower Decks Initiative
short: Ensign BOff Abilities grant Recharge Speed for Cmdr BOff Abilities and Captain Abilities
detailed:
* Ensign-rank Bridge Officer Abilities provide a stacking buff that lasts 2 minutes (max 10 stacks)
** +2% Recharge Reduction for Commander-rank Bridge Officer Abilities
** +2% Recharge Reduction for Captain Abilities
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[California Miracle Worker Utility Cruiser]]
basic:
* While this trait is slotted, activating any Ensign-rank Bridge Officer ability grants you a Recharge Speed reduction for Commander-Rank Bridge Officer Abilities and Captain Abilities, which lasts for an extended duration and stacks several times.
: Every effective Bridge Crew depends on the ingenuity of their Lower Decks, whether they know it or not.

name: Maintained to Regulation
short: Captain abilities cleanse 1 debuff and buff Boff ability recharge speed.
detailed:
* Self: Remove 1 debuff
* Self: -10% Recharge Time on Bridge Officer abilities
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[La Sirena Heavy Raider]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, activating any Captain Ability will remove 1 debuff effect from you and reduce the remaining recharge time of all Bridge Officer Abilities by a small amount.

name: Majority / Minority
short: Count Allies vs. Foes; Buffs depending on Counts.
detailed:
* ''Affects Anything Alive''
* Count Allies and Foes Within 10 km of Self
* If Allies outnumber Foes:
** +20 All Damage Resistance Rating
** +20% Shield Hardness
** +20% Hull Regeneration
* If Foes outnumber Allies:
** +20% All Damage
** +10% Flight Speed
** +10% Flight Turn Rate
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Tellarite Pralim Flight Deck Assault Carrier]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Orion Blackguard Flight Deck Assault Carrier]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Suliban Silik Flight Deck Assault Carrier]]
basic: * The number of Allies and Foes within 10km of you will be counted. Depending upon whether you are in the Minority (Foes outnumber Allies) or the Majority (Allies equal or outnumber Foes), you gain different combat benefits. Majority = Increased Damage Resistance, Shield Hardness, and Hull Regeneration. Minority = Increased Damage Output, and Flight Speed.

name: Make it So
short: BOff Abilities empower Captain Abilities.
detailed:
* Captain Abilities grant +1.5% Healing and Damage for 30 sec per rank of each Bridge Officer Ability affecting the ship
* Ensign Abilities grant 1.5%, Lt double, Lt Com triple, and Com quadruple
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Ross Command Exploration Cruiser]]
basic: * Activating [[Captain abilities (space)|Captain Abilities]] adds improved Healing and Damage for each rank of each [[Bridge officer abilities|Bridge Officer Ability]] currently affecting the ship. Ranks are [[Ensign]], [[Lieutenant]], [[Lieutenant Commander]], and [[Commander]]. Bonuses last 30 seconds.

name: Maneuvering Supremacy
short: Stacking Damage Buff after using a Miracle Worker or Tactical Bridge Officer ability + Maneuverability Buff at 5 stacks
detailed:
* Upon using a Miracle Worker or Tactical Bridge Officer Ability, gain the following benefits:
** Increases All Damage by 4% '''''(Stacks up to 5 times, Maximum 1 stack gained per second)'''''
** At 5 Stacks: Increases Flight Speed and Turn Rate by 25% for 10 seconds.
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[NP Miracle Worker Light Escort]]
basic: * Each time you use a Miracle Worker or Tactical Bridge Officer ability you gain a small Damage Increase for 10 seconds, stacking up to 5 times. Upon reaching 5 stacks, gain 25% Bonus Flight Speed and Turn Rate for the duration of the buff. Using additional Miracle Worker or Tactical Bridge Officer abilities refreshes the duration of the buff.

name: Mine, All Mine!
short: Mine created for every Hangar Pet launched + Teleport to furthest Foe + Kinetic Damage on Detonation
detailed:
Launches 3 level __ mines when each Hangar Pet is launched:
* Mines hold position for 2 seconds and then Teleport in front of a target, facing it
* Affects up to a Maximum of 9 targets in 1km sphere
* ___ Kinetic Damage (20% Shield Penetration) per mine
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Ark Royal Intel Science Carrier]]
basic:
* Your ship adopts a new technique to protect its Hangar Pets when they launch.
:For each launch three photon transporter mines are created, wait for 2 seconds and then are transported to your furthest enemies in a 10km sphere. With the photon detonation affecting up to 9 targets in a 1km AoE field.

name: Nano-Infestation
short: Physical DoT that spreads from target Enemy.
detailed:
Using a Bridge Officer Control ability triggers:
*Deals _ Physical damage per sec for 60 sec
*Damage spreads once to nearby enemies after 10 secs and resets duration
*45 sec cooldown
obtained: *<span class="veryrare" title="Very rare item" style="cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #303;">'''[Starship Trait: Nano-Infestation]'''</span> from the [[Section 31 Lock Box]] or the [[Infinity Prize Pack: Starship Trait]].
basic: * Using a [[Skill: Control Expertise#Abilities affected|Control power]] from one of your [[Bridge Officer]]s afflicts the enemy ship with a deadly mechanical pathogen built using nano-scale blueprints recovered from [[Section 31]] archives. It begins to take apart the ship from the inside, using the raw material to create copies of itself. After an incubation period of 10 seconds, it will spread to all nearby enemy ships. This ability has a 45 second cooldown.

name: Need-to-Know Basis
short: Summons S31 ship after using 10 ensign abilities.
detailed:
*Ensign Bridge Officer abilities add a stack of "Need-to-Know Basis" for 60 secs
*At 10 stacks, a Section 31 Interdictor shows up to assist for 31 seconds
obtained: *<span class="veryrare" title="Very rare item" style="cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #303;">'''[Starship Trait: Need-to-Know Basis]'''</span> from the [[Section 31 Lock Box]] or the [[Infinity Prize Pack: Starship Trait]].
basic: * Need-to-Know Basis is an ace up your sleeve, charged by activated Ensign Bridge Officer Abilities. Using 10 of these causes a [[Section 31 Intel Science Destroyer]] to appear and fight alongside you for 31 seconds, dealing significant area of effect damage with its abilities and opening up a full salvo with its weapons suite.

name: Never There
short: Probe Taunt + Slow enemies
detailed:
* Activating a Tactical or Intelligence Bridge Officer ability you summon 6 probes which distract your enemies
* Each probe creats a 2.5km sphere which:
**Taunts foes
**50% Debuff movement
**+20% Accuracy
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Breen Keth Sarr Intel Courier]]
basic:
*When backed into a corner the Breen like to have an escape plan so they can come back to fight another day.
:Never There utilizes specialized mobile emitters to Taunt enemy attackers by activating a Tactical or Intelligence Bridge Officer ability and also Slows them if they get too close to the emitters.

name: Non-Linear Progression
short: Reverse Causes Buffs.
detailed:
* Removes Power Drain from Reverse 
* While in Reverse: 
** After 5 sec, ___ Hit Points each second 
** After 5 sec, ___ Shield Regeneration per facing each second 
** ''Improved/Superior'': After 5 sec, -0.2/-0.33 seconds to the current recharge time of Captain Abilities each second.
obtained:
*<u>Non-Linear Progression</u>: 15 points spent into the [[Temporal Operative (specialization)|Temporal Operative specialization]].
*<u>Improved Non-Linear Progression</u>: 30 points spent into the Temporal Operative specialization.
*<u>Superior Non-Linear Progression</u>: [[Temporal Agent Recruitment|Temporal Agent]] account-wide reward after spending 30 points in 3 primary specializations.
basic:
* This trait eliminates the power drain that is naturally caused by leaving your ship in Reverse. In addition to this, after remaining in reverse for more than 5 seconds, your ship will begin regenerating Hull and Shields at an increased rate.
* The "Improved' version of this Starship Trait also causes Captain Abilities to recharge more quickly, by reducing active cooldowns by 0.2sec from their remaining recharge times, each second you remain in Reverse. This bonus also does not activate until you have been in Reverse for more than 5 seconds.

name: Nullifier Warheads
short: Spawns Nullifiers.
detailed:
When you use a torpedo firing mode:
*Spawns eight Nullifiers around your ship.
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Hur'q Vridyat Ravager Strike Wing Escort]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, activating any torpedo ability such as [[Ability: Torpedoes: High Yield|High Yield]] or [[Ability: Torpedoes: Spread|Spread]] will launch a flood of Nullifiers around your ship.

name: Numerical Superiority
short: +Dmg based on number of allies targeting your target.
detailed:
* Affects Friend and Self (5 max)
* to self: +10 to 50% All Damage based on number of allies targeting your target.
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Hestia Advanced Escort]]
basic: * You gain a damage bonus that increases as more allies target your targeted foe, including yourself. This includes pets like Saucer Separation or Multi-Vector pets, but not [[Hangar pet]]s.

name: Obedience is Victory
short: Team Abilities call Jem'Hadar Attack Ship.
detailed: * Activation of Team Abilities will summon a Jem'Hadar Attack Ship to assist for 20 sec ''(Activations refresh duration)''.
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Jem'Hadar Light Battlecruiser]]
basic: * Summon a [[Jem'Hadar Attack Ship (Mob)|Jem'Hadar Attack Ship]] whenever you activate Team Abilities. This ally will fight by your side for a brief time. Subsequent activations of Team abilities will extend the duration of the ally's help.

name: Omega Bond
short: [[Specialization: Pilot#Space Abilities|Pilot]] Abilities and [[Attack Pattern Omega (ability)|Attack Pattern Omega]] grant Buff to Team
detailed:
* Pilot abilities and AP Omega grant:
** +10% Bonus All Damage
** +15 Defense Rating
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Undine Cheirax Bio-Warship]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, activating Attack Pattern Omega or any Pilot Bridge Officer power, you and all teammates within 10km gain Omega Bond for a short time. Omega Bond boosts Damage and Defense. Subsequent applications of Omega Bond will refresh the duration of Omega Bond.

name: Onboard Dilithium Recrystallizer
short: Using an Engineering Ability adds Power to Subsystem with least, Bonus Damage for maxed Subsystems.
detailed:
* Add 10 Power per sec to whichever Subsystem is lowest
* +10% Bonus Damage per non-Weapon Power Subsystem currently at maximum for 35 sec
obtained: *<span class="veryrare" title="Very rare item" style="cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #303;">'''[Starship Trait: Onboard Dilithium Recrystallizer]'''</span> from the [[Angel's Wake Lock Box]] or the [[Infinity Prize Pack: Starship Trait]].
basic:
* Activating an Engineering Bridge Officer Ability adds Bonus Damage to the ship for each non-Weapon Subsystem at maximum Power, lasting a moderate duration. Then, it adds Power to whichever Subsystem has the least Power for a short duration. Only the largest Bonus Damage applies if this triggers more than once. By default, Subsystems have a maximum of 125 Power, but certain abilities can improve this limit.
* This bit of clever engineering gathers and refines waste Dilithium, extracting trace fragments and encouraging them to form usable refined crystals. These are then immediately fed back into the ship's core.

name: One Big Happy Fleet
short: Shields Offline with First Combat Damage; Increasing Shield Pen during Combat.
detailed:
* While in Combat: +5% Energy Weapon Shield Penetration every 10 sec (10 stacks max)
* When Entering Combat, on First Damage Dealt: Shields Subsystem Offline for 7 sec
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Miranda Multi-Mission Cruiser]]
basic: * The first damage your ship deals during [[Space combat|combat]] will force that foe's shields offline for a moderate duration, allowing opportunity for a devastating initial volley. Thereafter, you will gain an increasing amount of [[Skill: Shield Penetration|Shield Penetration]] for [[ship weapon|Energy Weapons]] as long as you remain in Combat. This benefit resets when you leave combat.

Page: One Impossible Thing at a Time (starship trait)
name: One Impossible Thing at a Time
short: Captain abilities reduce Recharge for team's Captain abilities.
detailed: * To Self and Team: -5% Recharge Time on Captain Abilities (Max once every 5 sec)
obtained: *<span class="veryrare" title="Very rare item" style="cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #303;">'''[Starship Trait: One Impossible Thing at a Time]'''</span> from the [[Picard Zhat Vash Lock Box]] or the [[Infinity Prize Pack: Starship Trait]].
basic: * When you activate any Captain Ability, you and all teammates will receive an immediate reduction to Captain Ability Recharge Times. Each player affected by this may only benefit from the reduction once every 5 seconds.

name: Ouroboros Driver
short: Tactical and Intel abilities reduce Engineering and Miracle Worker recharge times, and vice versa
detailed:
* Self: -10% Recharge Time on Tactical and Intelligence Bridge Officer abilities when using Engineering or Miracle Worker Bridge Officer abilities.
* Self: -10% Recharge Time on Engineering and Miracle Worker Bridge Officer abilities when using Tactical or Intelligence Bridge Officer abilities.
obtained: * <span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Federation Intel Holoship]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, and when activating an Tactical or Intelligence Bridge Officer ability, it will reduce the recharge time of all cooldowns on Engineering and Miracle Worker Bridge Officer Abilities, and vice versa.

name: Out of Time
short: At High Speed: Cold Dmg to Self, Store Stacks / At Lower Speed: -Recharge to Boff abilities from # of Stacks
detailed:
* Once per sec, while above 88 Impulse Speed:
** 1,000 Cold Damage to self
** Gain a stack of ''Out of Time''
* When dropping below 88 Impulse Speed:
** Reduce Recharge of Bridge Officer Abilities by 2% per stack of ''Out of Time''
** Removes all stacks of ''Out of Time'',and unable to gain stacks for 5 sec
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Verne Temporal Science Vessel]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Qul'poH Temporal Science Vessel]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Sui'Mor Temporal Science Vessel]]
basic:
* While this trait is slotted, traveling above 88 Impulse Speed will cause you to gain stacks of "Out of Time" while suffering minor cold damage each second. When you then drop below 88 Impulse Speed, all stacks of "Out of Time" are removed and a scaling bonus to your Bridge Officer Recharge times is applied based on the number of stacks obtained (25 max stacks).
* This trait will only be active while in combat, and above 10% Hull. The Bridge Officer Recharge buff will apply immediately even if you are still traveling above the impulse threshold, if either of these conditions change.

name: Over-Powered and Over-Gunned
short: Activating beam or cannon weapon firing modes improves weapon haste, duration increase with global Critical Strike Chance.
detailed:
On Beam or Cannon Special Firing Mode:
*-15% Weapon Power Cost for 5-10 sec
*12.5% Firing Cycle Haste for Weapons for 5-10 sec (from 5-10 sec based on global Critical Strike Chance)
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Defiant Pilot Warship]]
basic: * Activating [[Beams: Fire at Will (ability)|Beams: Fire at Will]], [[Beams: Overload (ability)|Beams: Overload]], [[Cannons: Rapid Fire (ability)|Cannons: Rapid Fire]], [[Cannons: Scatter Volley (ability)|Cannons: Scatter Volley]], or [[Energy Weapons: Surgical Strikes (ability)|Energy Weapons: Surgical Strikes]] improves weapon haste significantly for a short time. The duration increases with global Critical Strike Chance, up to double duration at 50% global Critical Strike Chance. Weapon Power Cost is reduced during the same period.

name: Overwhelming Force
short: Beam Overloads create Charged Particle Bursts. High Yield Torpedoes create Photonic Shockwaves.
detailed:
Grants '''Overwhelming Force (High Yield)'''
*to target: Applies '''Overwhelming Force (High Yield)'''
**___ Kinetic Damage
**Disable for __ sec
**+___ Repel
Grants '''Overwhelming Force (Overload)'''
*to target: Applies '''Overwhelming Force (Overload)'''
**-___ Target Shields
**Disables cloaking systems for __ sec
obtained:
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Mat'Ha Raptor]]
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> <span style="font-family:'FuturaBody', Tahoma, Geneva, Arial;" class="rare lht-data">[[[Starship Trait Unlock - Overwhelming Force / Tactical Retreat (Federation)|<span class="rare">Starship Trait Unlock - Overwhelming Force / Tactical Retreat (Federation)</span>]]]</span> ''(Retired)''
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> <span style="font-family:'FuturaBody', Tahoma, Geneva, Arial;" class="rare lht-data">[[[Starship Trait Unlock - Reciprocity / Overwhelming Force (Romulan)|<span class="rare">Starship Trait Unlock - Reciprocity / Overwhelming Force (Romulan)</span>]]]</span> ''(Retired)''
basic: *Your [[Beams: Overload (ability)|Beams: Overload]] attacks will create a [[Charged Particle Burst (ability)|Charged Particle Burst]], with a reduced radius and effectiveness at the target's location. Your [[Torpedoes: High Yield (ability)|Torpedoes: High Yield]] attacks will create a [[Photonic Shockwave (ability)|Photonic Shockwave]], with a reduced radius and effectiveness at the target's location.

name: Painful Memories
short: Eng BOff Abilities cause Slow + Electric DoT
detailed:
* To any Foe affected by one of your Engineering Bridge Officer Abilities, for 10 sec:
** -50% Flight Speed
** __ Electrical Damage per sec (100% Shield Penetration)
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Andorian Kuthar Pilot Escort]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Lethean Oniros Pilot Escort]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Dewan Dynnasia Pilot Escort]]
basic: * This trait causes a psionic energy resonance within the EPS of enemy ships, when activating any Foe-affecting Engineering Bridge Officer Abilities. This is reflected by an Electrical Damage-over-Time effect that also Slows the afflicted foe's engines.

name: Pakled Big!
short: +Damage +Temp HP +Energy
detailed:
When activating Non-Specialist Bridge Officer Abilities, for 10 sec (stacks 15 times):
*+1% All Damage
*+1 Current and Max All Subsystem Power
*+1% of Max Hull Capacity applied as Temporary Hit Points
*Additional stacks refresh all existing ones
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Pakled Miracle Worker Clumpship]]
basic: * [[Pakled]]s might not know how technology works, but they certainly know how to make it work. They pick up scrap from fallen ships and stick whatever survives into their systems. As such, you can never know what to expect when dealing with one.

name: Parry and Thrust
short: Additional Plasma Dmg and Crit Severity from Evasive Maneuvers, Brace for Impact, Pilot Maneuvers
detailed:
*Activating Evasive Maneuvers, Brace for Impact, or Pilot Maneuvers grants 5 stacks of Parry and Thrust
*Per stack: +10% Critical Severity with Directed Energy Weapons for 10 sec
*Max once per second when hitting with Directed Energy Weapons, consume 1 stack to deal ____ Plasma Damage to target
obtained: *<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Legendary Dhelan Pilot Warbird]]
basic: * Duck, dip, and dodge the enemy, and return fire with a deadly well-placed strike. Activating Pilot Maneuvers, Evasive Maneuvers, or Brace for Impact will grant you multiple stacks of "Parry and Thrust." While these stacks are present, you will gain increased Critical Severity with your directed energy weapons for each stack. Max once per second, consume one stack of "Parry and Thrust" to deal an additional burst of Plasma damage to your currently targeted enemy.

name: Particle Feedback Loop
short: Exotic Damage boosts Hull Penetration
detailed:
* to self: +50 Starship Hull Penetration for 30 sec
: ''(Improves Hull Penetration for Starship Weapons)''
: ''(Stacks up to 3 times)''
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Eternal Temporal Multi-Mission Science Vessel]]
basic: *  While this trait is slotted using an Exotic Damage ability will provide a small bonus to Armor Penetration. This bonus stacks up to 3 times.

name: Particle Fluctuation Analysis
short: Uni Consoles grant Teamwide Buffs to Crit, AuxPwr, Perception
detailed:
Activating a Universal Console grants the following buffs to self and up to 4 nearby players for 10 sec (stacks up to 10 times):
*+1% Critical Chance and Healing Critical Chance
*+10% Critical Severity and Healing Critical Severity
*+2 Current and Max Auxiliary Power
*+15 Starship Perception
:''(Improves Detection of Cloaked Ships)''
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Nebula Temporal Science Spearhead]]
basic: * Activating any Universal Console ability will grant a stacking bonus to yourself and up to 4 players within 10km. This bonus provides increases to Critical Hits, Critical Healing, Auxiliary Power, and Perception. It can stack up to 10 times, and each activation refreshes all existing stacks.

name: Parting Gift
short: Tractor Beam reduces Resistance, deals Kinetic Damage and Engines Offline.
detailed:
* To Target: -10 Damage Resistance Rating while affected by Tractor Beam
* ___ Kinetic Damage (100% Shield Penetration)
* Knocks Engines Offline for 5 sec
obtained: *<span class="veryrare" title="Very rare item" style="cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #303;">'''[Starship Trait: Parting Gift]'''</span> from the [[Privateer Lock Box]] or the [[Infinity Prize Pack: Starship Trait]].
basic: * [[Tractor Beam (ability)|Tractor Beam]] reduces the target's damage resistance and will leave behind a warhead that detonates after a few seconds, knocking engines offline for a brief period.

name: Partners In Arms
short: Ally Buffs give Self Damage Buff
detailed:
* to self: +10% All Damage for 10 sec
* ''(Stacks up to 3 times)''
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Hazari Destroyer]]
basic: * While the Partners in Arms starship trait is active your ally targeted heals and buffs now provide you with a boost to all damage for a short time. This buff stacks up to 3 times.

name: Peak Efficiency
short: -Recharge Time on Bridge Officer Abilities
detailed: * Self: -7.5% Recharge Time to all Bridge Officer Abilities every 5 seconds hull strength is at or above 80%.
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Herald Vonph Dreadnought Carrier]]
basic: * While this starship trait is slotted, every few seconds all of your recharging Bridge Officer abilities will have their remaining recharge time reduced by a small amount if your hull strength is at or above 80%.

name: Pedal to the Metal
short: Increased Damage from Full Throtle.
detailed:
Pedal to the Metal/Improved/Superior:
* +1%/+2%/+3% All Damage Bonus per 2 seconds spent at Full Throttle.
* (Normal/Improved: max 10 stacks)(Superior: up to +30% max). All stacks immediately lost if your throttle is dropped.
obtained:
*<u>Pedal to the Metal</u>: 15 points spent into the [[Pilot (specialization)|Pilot specialization]].
*<u>Improved Pedal to the Metal</u>: 30 points spent into the Pilot specialization.
*<u>Superior Pedal to the Metal</u>: [[Temporal Agent Recruitment|Temporal Agent]] account-wide reward after spending 30 points in 3 primary specializations.
basic: * Maintaining full throttle for extended durations allows you to build up excess resonant energy that can be redirected into outgoing attacks as additional damage. This bonus only applies while you remain at Full Throttle, and takes several seconds to build up to its full potential.

name: Persistence Hunters
short: -Res -Speed Stacks; Eng and Shield Offline
detailed:
When using a Foe targeted Boff Ability:
*-10 All Damage Resistance Rating
*-9.1% Flight Speed
*Max 5 stacks
*10km max range
Upon reaching 5 stacks:
*Impulse subsystem offline for 5 sec
*Shields subsystem offline for 5 sec
*Becomes immune to Persistence Hunters for 20 sec
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Echelon Intel Science Spearhead]]
basic:
*When humanity was young, one of its main advantages over other animals was the ability to hunt for long amounts of time, eventually draining its prey from stamina. Likewise, our Bridge Officers are trained to analyze and target key points in their foe's starship slowing and making them more vulnerable, till finally their systems shut down.
:Using a Bridge Officer ability that targets a Foe will give them a stack of ''Persistence Hunters'' reducing their resistance and flying speed for 15 seconds, up to a max of 5 stacks. Upon reaching the fifth, the stacks will clear and the target's shield and impulse subsystems will go offline for 5 seconds, while being immune to further applications of ''Persistence Hunters'' till this debuff has cleared.

name: Persistence of the Founders
short: AP:Beta and Temp OP Abilities grant +Damage, Haste.
detailed:

basic: * Point Defense Protocols channel power from energy weapon enhancements to activate an automated defense turret on your ship. The turret fires at nearby enemies while an energy weapon enhancement is active, dealing [[Proton|proton damage]] to the nearest target every half second. Automated defense turrets have highly sophisticated targeting systems, and never miss.

:This effect may only be triggered once every few seconds. The heal-over-time effect can only affect yourself and up to 12 of your nearest pets, but may be granted to any pet type without restriction. This trait will only trigger while in combat.

name: Redirecting Arrays
short: Fire at Will Duration Extended by Damage
detailed: * Once per sec while [[Beams: Fire at Will (ability)|Beams: Fire at Will]] is active, receiving Any Damage grants 0.33 sec Duration to Fire at Will (15 sec total duration maximum).
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Tucker Tactical Miracle Worker Cruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Klothos Tactical Miracle Worker Cruiser]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Tebok Tactical Miracle Worker Warbird]]
basic: * While Beam Array: Fire at Will is active, any damage that your starship receives will periodically extend its duration.

name: Regeneration Cycle
short: Using BOff Abilities repairs hull.
detailed:
Using each of Sci, Eng, and Tac Bridge Officer Abilities within 5 sec:
*+___ Hit Points
*10 sec recharge
obtained: *<span class="veryrare" title="Very rare item" style="cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #303;">'''[Starship Trait: Regeneration Cycle]'''</span> from the [[Borg Lock Box]] or the [[Infinity Prize Pack: Starship Trait]].
basic:
* Activating at least one each of a Science, Tactical, and Engineering Bridge Officer Ability within 5 seconds repairs a substantial amount of hull.
* Inspired by Borg technology rather than merely a copy of it, this system improves upon the original design. Borg ships can devote their processing power to sudden distributed maintenance, but must shut down many functions to do so. By cross-training crew members and dynamically distributing emergent repair tasks among different disciplines, certain shipwide repairs can be accomplished without shutdown or even commitment of personnel.

* Self: -15% Recharge Time on Temporal Operative Bridge Officer abilities

name: Relaunch and Repair

basic: * While this trait is slotted, whenever you activate a carrier launch ability, the cooldown of your captain abilities will be reduced, and you and your carrier pets will receive a substantial boost to hull regeneration.

name: Repair Mode
short: Taking Damage Grants Repair Mode
detailed:
*After taking a large amount of damage gain 1 Repair Mode Counter for 120 sec
:''(May occur once every 3 seconds)''
*On 3rd Repair Mode Counter enter '''Repair Mode''':
**Self: +10,000 Hit Points every 0.5 sec for 5 sec
**Self: +500 All Damage Bonus Resistance Rating for 5 sec
**Self: 50,000 Temporary Hit Points for 5 sec
**Self: Disable for 5 sec
**Self: Removes all Repair Mode Counters
**Locks out ability to generate Repair Mode Counters for 90 sec
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Universe Temporal Heavy Dreadnought Cruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Durgath Temporal Heavy Dreadnought Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Valkis Temporal Heavy Dreadnought Warbird]]

Upon receiving your 3rd Repair Mode Counter, you will immediately become disabled, gain a very high increase to damage resistance, and a large amount of temporary hit points.  You’ll also gain a powerful heal over time effect for the duration of Repair Mode.

name: Repulsive
short: Repel+PhysDmg from Eng/Command Boff Abilities

*After activating Engineering/Command bridge officer ability - to nearest foe within 3km, and up to 2 other foes in 45-degree arc:

This causes some Physical Damage (ignores shields) and will push that foe and up to 2 other nearby enemy ships a good distance away from your vessel. Once triggered, there is a 10 second lockout. If there are no valid foes within 3km, it will not trigger the lockout.

obtained: * <span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Typhon Command Escort Carrier]]

While these pets are essentially identical to the Hangar Pets of the same name, they will not be tracked on your hangar HUD, and may not respond to your hangar commands. You may only deploy six (6) of these additional Valkyrie Squadrons at any point in time. This trait is not triggered by pet summons that are not  Hangar Bay Pets.

This probe uses a low-power Heal-over-Time on its assigned ally, as well as passively draining the shields of up to 3 nearby foes. The probe lasts for 10 seconds, and can be summoned once every 30 seconds. ''Enhances specific powers. Applies in specific circumstances.''

Each triggered effect will be as effective as the opposite Bridge Officer Ability of the same rank. These triggered effects both last 15 seconds, and do not cause additional triggers of their own. They also do not cause any external cooldowns, nor have lockouts of their own.

Both of these effects only affect up to the 10 nearest foes.

Max once per second

obtained: * <span class="veryrare" title="Very rare item" style="cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted #303;">'''[Starship Trait: Sentient Starship]'''</span> from the [[Discovery: Unlikely Allies Lock Box]].
basic:
* Activating a Hull Heal when the Hull is below 90% capacity improves Hull Heals until you leave the current map, stacking up to 20 times. Activating a Shield Heal when a shield facing is below 90% capacity improves Shield Heals until you leave the current map, stacking up to 10 times, and auto-redistributes shield facings for several seconds.
* While Starfleet does not attempt to engineer sentient machines, it strives to accommodate and treat well unusual forms of life it encounters. That friendly AI have often come close to negative outcomes, and hostile AI have at times come close to destroying the Federation, means that these proceedings are handled with the utmost care.

Damage Reflection may only be triggered 5 times every second, and will not attempt to reflect small sources or damage, or damage-over-time effects.

Heisenberg Decoupling or Ingenious Solutions triggered by:

Barclay Maneuver or Plasma Conduit Purge triggered by:

* Sci: +5 Tactical Readiness
* Tac: +1.25% Critical Severity

* All of the Anomalies created by your Bridge Officer Anomaly Abilities will periodically allow Lost Souls to pass through through ruptured space, allowing these vicious entities to tear into nearby starships. They will randomly target nearby enemies and attack them with their spectral claws, dealing Physical Damage to any starship they choose to attack.
* You may have a maximum of 12 lost souls active at any point in time, regardless of the number of Anomalies you have active.

name: Temporal Ally
short: Critically Low Shields: Summon Ally
detailed:
*When receiving damage while a shield facing is depleted or critically low: 
**Summons a Temporal Ally for 30 seconds 
**Can be triggered once every 90 seconds
**Self: Immunity to damage for 3 sec
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Na'kuhl Acheros Battlecruiser]]

name: Temporal Anchor

detailed:
* Your Gravity Wells deal 20% additional damage as Radiation
* Your Gravity Wells have a 2% chance per sec to add 2 sec to foe Ability recharge ''(affects boff abilities against Players)''
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Glenn Temporal Operative Science Vessel]]

This gives the Gravity Well a distinctive appearance, additional Radiation damage, and a chance per tick to add cooldown to foe abilities. This only affects Bridge Officer Ability recharge times when used against Players, instead of all abilities.

name: Temporal Artifact Scan

detailed:
* Every 3s, attempts to detect a Temporal Artifact aboard a Foe starship (120 sec recharge after one is found)
* Defeating that Foe spawns the artifact as a pickup, collecting it provides stacking +25% Critical Severity until mapmove
obtained: *<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Orion D'Var Temporal Science Vessel]]
basic: * While this trait is slotted, your ship's sensors will scan the area for chroniton radiation coming from a Temporal Artifact housed aboard an enemy starship. Once the Artifact is located, defeating that ship will drop it into space as a pickup. Collecting an Artifact provides a significant bonus to Critical Severity until leaving the map. This effect has a long cooldown, but eventually another Artifact will be located.

name: Temporal Insight
short: Temporary Immunity from Hull Heals.
detailed:
*''Temporal Insight'': Immunity to All Damage for 2 sec (Max once per 45 seconds)
*''Improved TI'': Immunity to All Damage for 4 sec (Max once per 45 seconds)
obtained:
*<u>Temporal Insight</u>: account-wide unlock after completing half of all Story Arcs as a [[Delta Recruitment|Delta Recruit]].
*<u>Improved Temporal Insight</u>: account-wide unlock after completing all Story Arcs as a Delta Recruit.
basic: * Your insight into future events allows you to pre-emptively reduce the impact of enemy weapon fire. Activating any hull-restoring ability will grant your vessel a short period of immunity from all damage. Improved variants gives a 4 second immunity.

name: Temporal Investigator
short: Using Specialization Abilities Triggers More Abilities
detailed:
* When using a Specialist Bridge Officer Ability for the first time in a map, or further Abilities of that same Specialization, 35% chance to use any one of:

** [[Miracle Worker]]: [[Deploy Gravitic Induction Platform (ability)|Deploy Gravitic Induction Platform]] I, [[Destabilize Warp Core (ability)|Destabilize Warp Core]] I, [[Overwhelm Power Regulators (ability)|Overwhelm Power Regulators]] I
** [[Intelligence]]: [[Electromagnetic Pulse Probe (ability)|Electromagnetic Pulse Probe]] I, [[Subnucleonic Carrier Wave (ability)|Subnucleonic Carrier Wave]] I, [[Ionic Turbulence (ability)|Ionic Turbulence]] I
** [[Pilot]]: [[Subspace Boom (ability)|Subspace Boom]] I, [[Reinforcements Squadron (ability)|Reinforcements Squadron]] I, [[Deploy Countermeasures (ability)|Deploy Countermeasures]] I
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Augur Temporal Science Vessel]]
basic: * Using a Specialization Bridge Officer Ability for the first time in an area, or another Ability of the same Specialization, has a chance to trigger an additional Ability of that Specialization. Which Ability depends on the Specialization used.

obtained: *<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Legendary Valdore Temporal Ops Strike Wing Escort Warbird]]
basic: * When your Bridge Officer uses a Consumer Temporal Ops ability or a Commander ability, your ship has a 20% chance per Entropy on the target to trigger Gravimetric Conversion I, Rapid Decay I, or Timeline Collapse I automatically. That ability will use the same Entropy stacks that were there at time of trigger, even if another ability has already consumed them.

name: Temporal Stasis Field

name: Test Them
short: Decloak and defeat Foe to earn Aura Buff
detailed:
* Defeating a marked Foe enables They Are Weak
* They Are Weak:
** Self and Allies receive +15%-30% Increased Damage and +10%-25% Hull Capacity based on marked Foe's rank
** Highest defeated rank applies and removes earlier bonuses
** Damaging a Foe during Ambush (the damage buff granted by decloaking) marks them for 40 sec

They Are Weak is a buff that improves self and allied ships’ Damage and Hull Capacity and lasts until mapmove. Only the largest applies.

name: Torpedo Command and Control

name: Totally Lost All Control

This effect can only be triggered once every several seconds.

name: Transcranial Sensor Link

* Defeated Foes larger than frigates drop pickups that improve Shield Penetration
* +10 Shield Penetration per Foe analyzed, until mapmove (max 20 Foes analyzed)

Each cloud of debris analyzed adds a stacking bonus to [[Skill: Shield Penetration|Shield Penetration]] which lasts until map move. Debris is gradually [[Tractor Beam|tractored]] toward your ship.

name: Trauma Response

:*Used on Self: +5% Shield Healing and +5% Max Shield Capacity
:*Used on Ally: +7.5% Shield Penetration
:Each lasts for 30 sec and stacks up to 10 times

basic:
*While this trait is slotted, Shield Healing abilities that you activate will grant additional bonuses. The bonus will differ based on whether the ability was targeting an ally or yourself. Each bonus lasts for 30 seconds, and may be stacked up to 10 times by subsequent activations.
*When restoring your own shields, you receive a bonus to Shield Capacity and Shield Healing.
*When restoring the shields of an ally, you receive a bonus to Shield Penetration for all damage dealt.
*This trait can be triggered by any Shield Healing ability that is manually activated, but not those that automatically trigger.

*-20% Weapon Power Cost for yourself and allies within 7.5km for 15 sec.

* All stacks lost if Throttle goes above 25%
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Tzenkethi Rhas'bej Battlecruiser]]
basic: *While this trait is slotted, you may conserve your energy and move slowly, in order to gain additional Shield Capacity, Shield Hardness, and Turn Rate. These bonuses ramp up the longer you remain at or below 25% Throttle, increasing every 2 seconds.

name: Unconventional Tactics
short: Brace for Impact grants Damage Buff.
detailed:
When Brace for Impact is activated:
* ''Unconventional Tactics'': +15% Bonus All Damage for 15 sec
* ''Improved Uncon.Tactics'': +20% Bonus All Damage for 15 sec
obtained:
*<u>Unconventional Tactics</u>: 15 points spent into the [[Strategist (specialization)|Strategist specialization]].
*<u>Improved Unconventional Tactics</u>: [[Gamma Recruitment]] account-wide reward after spending 45 points in any specializations.
basic: * Activating [[Brace for Impact (ability)|Brace for Impact]] increases your damage for a short period of time.

name: Unified Engineering
short: Auxiliary Power to the Structural Integrity Field and Command Abilities buff team
detailed:
When activating Auxiliary Power to the Structural Integrity Field or any Command Bridge Officer Ability:
*To Team and Self for 15 sec:
**+10% Maximum Hull Capacity
**+10% Bridge Officer Ability Recharge Speed
**+10% Flight Turn Rate
**+10% Flight Speed
**+50% Hull Regen
obtained:
*<span title="Federation and Federation-aligned characters">[[File:Faction FED-Allies.png|24px|link=Federation-aligned]]</span> [[Buran Command Dreadnought Cruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon Empire and Klingon-aligned characters">[[File:Faction KDF-Allies.png|16px|link=Klingon-aligned]]</span> [[Qoj Command Dreadnought Cruiser]]
basic: * Activating any Command Bridge Officer Ability or Auxiliary Power to the Structural Integrity Field will grant your team and hangar pets a buff to hull capacity, regeneration, bridge officer cooldown speed, flight speed, and turn rate for a short duration.

name: Unity Shielding
short: Stacking Dmg Resist that Holds Attackers
detailed:
* Gain a charge of Unity Shielding every 20 sec (speeds up with Aux Power) up to 10 max
* Each charge grants +10 All Damage Resistance Rating for 30 sec (new charges refresh duration)
* When taking damage, consume one charge to Hold attacker for 5 sec
* Foes held this way are Immune for 15 sec (double vs. Players)
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Aetherian Revelation]]
basic:
* Every few seconds, gain a charge of Unity Shielding that will increase your resilience against incoming hull damage. This effect may stack several times, and new charges refresh all existing charges. While you have at least one charge, attackers may be automatically Held when they deal damage to your ship. If an enemy is Held in this manner, it consumes one charge of Unity Shielding.
:Enemies Held this way become Immune to this effect for some time after (double duration immunity for Players). The rate at which new charges are gained is influenced by your current Auxiliary Power.

name: Universal Designs
short: Crit Buffs from Universal Consoles.
detailed:
When activating a Universal Console (lasts for 20 sec, stacks up to 5 times):
* +2% Critical Chance
* +10% Critical Severity
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Crossfield Science Spearhead Refit]]
basic: * Each time you activate an ability of a Universal Console, your ship gains a boost to universal Critical Hit Chance and Critical Severity. Each activation of this Trait refreshes the duration of all existing stacks, and you may have up to 5 stacks active simultaneously.

name: Unstable Anomalies
short: Gravity Well, Tyken's Rift, Chronometric Inversion Field, and Timeline Collapse explode and reduce Accuracy and Damage.
detailed:
Upon expiration of [[Gravity Well (ability)|Gravity Well]], [[Tyken's Rift (ability)|Tyken's Rift]], [[Chronometric Inversion Field (ability)|Chronometric Inversion Field]] or [[Timeline Collapse (ability)|Timeline Collapse]]:
:'''''(Applies to up to 5 foes within 5 km)''':''
:* ____ Kinetic Damage (Ignores Shields)
:* -20% Accuracy Rating
:* -28.6% All Damage
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Paradox Temporal Dreadnought]]
basic: *While this trait is slotted, your [[Gravity Well (ability)|Gravity Well]], [[Tyken's Rift (ability)|Tyken's Rift]], [[Chronometric Inversion Field (ability)|Chronometric Inversion Field]] and [[Timeline Collapse (ability)|Timeline Collapse]] anomalies will cause heavy kinetic damage in a 5km area of effect when they expire. This damage is improved by [[Skill: Exotic Particle Generator|Exotic Particle Generator]] skill.

name: Use of Power
short: Weapon Skills from Sci/MW Boff Abilities
detailed:
For 20sec, when activating Science or Miracle Worker Abilities:
* +___ Starship Shield Penetration (Improves Shield Penetration for Starship Weapons)
* +___ Starship Weapon Specialization (Improves Critical Hit Chance with Weapons)
* +___ Starship Weapon Amplification (Improves Critical Hit Severity with Weapons)

Values scale with Max Auxiliary Power

May only trigger once per 60sec
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Proxima Miracle Worker Science Dreadnought]]
basic: * Built to enhance the use of the ship’s deflector array; your ship exploits the Maximum Auxiliary Power Cap and uses the extra energy to boost a number of subsystems to assist in combat. Enhancing your Starship Shield Penetration and Weapon Specialization and Weapon Amplification for a set period.

name: Vanguard Shield Shaping
short: Torpedo and Exotic BOFF Abilities grant Forward Shields and Kinetic Damage
detailed:
* Torpedo Firing Modes and Exotic Bridge Officer Abilities grant:
** +20% Bonus All Damage with Torpedo Weapons and Exotic Damage Abilities for 30 sec
** +25% Forward Shield Capacity for 30 sec
** Max 4 stacks
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Dauntless II Command Science Dreadnought]]
basic:
* While this trait is slotted, activating a Bridge Officer Torpedo Firing Mode or Exotic Damage Ability grants bonus Kinetic Damage and Forward Shield Facing. In each case, the mechanism is the same: particle projectors are used to bias the Shield forward, creating an overcharged region of the field.
:Torpedoes passing through this region receive knock-on benefits as the excess shield energy is shunted into their warheads. This is very bad for the longevity of the warhead, but since torpedoes fired in combat tend not to spend much time in storage, the tradeoff is acceptable.

name: Vanguard Specialists
short: Reduced Recharge and Extend Durations for Specialist Weapon Modes.
detailed: * Specialist Bridge Officer Abilities that apply Weapon Modification have their Recharge Times reduced by 33% and their Durations extended by 5 seconds.
obtained: *<span title="Dominion">[[File:Faction Dominion.png|16px|link=Dominion-only]]</span> [[Legendary Jem'Hadar Vanguard Pilot Attack Ship]]
basic:
*While this Trait is slotted, all of the following Specialist Bridge Officer Abilities will have their Recharge Times reduced by 33% of their base recharge time, as well as having their maximum durations extended by 5 seconds:
** [[Energy Weapons: Surgical Strikes (ability)|Energy Weapons: Surgical Strikes]] ([[Intel]])
** [[Suppression Barrage (ability)|Suppression Barrage]] ([[Command]])
** [[Energy Weapons: Reroute Reserves to Weapons (ability)|Energy Weapons: Reroute Reserves to Weapons]] ([[Pilot]])
** [[Recursive Shearing (ability)|Recursive Shearing]] ([[Temporal Operative]])
** [[Energy Weapons: Exceed Rated Limits (ability)|Energy Weapons: Exceed Rated Limits]] ([[Miracle Worker]])

name: Vaulting Ambition
short: Critical Severity vs foes at low health.
detailed: *+175% Critical Severity vs foes below 20% health.
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Styx Terran Dreadnought Cruiser]]
basic: *While this trait is slotted, your energy weapons gain massive Critical Severity vs foes at low health.

name: Vent Metreon Laced Plasma
short: Eject Warp Plasma causes delayed AoE explosions.
detailed:
After 15 sec, each Plasma Cloud created by Eject Warp Plasma will explode inflicting:
* ___ Plasma Damage (Ignores Shields) in a 1km radius
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Vizier Command Assault Cruiser]] & [[Legendary Sovereign Miracle Worker Assault Cruiser]]
basic: * [[Eject Warp Plasma (ability)|Eject Warp Plasma]] will have its duration reduced from 30 seconds to 15 seconds, but each plasma cloud will explode in a 1km AoE dealing shield-penetrating Plasma damage.

name: Voth Carrier Synergies
short: Tac and Eng abilities buff self & pets
detailed:
*When using any Engineering Boff Ability:
**To Self: +10% Incoming Hull Healing for 15 sec
**Enables Immunity Shield on your pets for 15 sec
*When using any Tactical Boff Ability:
**To Self: +10% All Damage for 15 sec
**Enables Aceton Mode on your pets for 15 sec
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Voth Rampart Command Flight Deck Carrier]]
basic: *While this trait is slotted, your Engineering Bridge Officer abilities will increase the healing you receive for a short duration, and grant your pets a short duration Immunity Shield, making them immune to all damage up to a certain threshold. Additionally, your Tactical Bridge Officer Abilities will enable increase your outgoing damage for a short duration and enable Aceton Mode on your hangar pets, causing them to drain the power levels of nearby foes, and deal radiation damage to all foes in an area after a short duration.

name: Vulcan Hello
short: Armor Pen and Shield Pen from Entering Combat.
detailed:
* Upon entering Combat:
** +20 Energy Weapon Hull Penetration for 8 sec
** +10% Energy Weapon Shield Penetration for 8 sec
** -50% Weapon Power Cost for 8 sec
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Walker Light Exploration Cruiser]] & [[Legendary Walker Light Battlecruiser]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> <span style="font-family:'FuturaBody', Tahoma, Geneva, Arial;" class="veryrare lht-data">[[[Cross-Faction Bundle - Walker-class Light Exploration Cruiser Equipment|<span class="veryrare">Cross-Faction Bundle: Walker-class Light Exploration Cruiser Equipment</span>]]]</span> ''(Retired)''
basic: *During early encounters with the [[Klingon Empire]], it became apparent that only an outward show of force would earn their respect, and open lines of communication with their warriors. The [[Vulcan]]s were the first to adopt this tactic in a widespread manner, and this technique is named in honor of those early encounters. When entering combat, your Weapons gain a [[Skill: Shield Penetration|Shield]] and [[Skill: Hull Penetration|Armor]] Penetration bonus, and Weapon Power Drain from energy weapon activation is reduced for a brief duration. Strike first, strike hard. It is only logical.

name: Warp Shadow Decoy
short: On Cloak: Create Decoy.
detailed: * Creates a Warp Shadow of your ship for 15 sec that will taunt NPC enemy starships when you cloak.
obtained: *<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Aelahl Light Warbird Battlecruiser]]
basic: * [[Cloak]]ing will cause a Warp Shadow to appear near your location, causing enemy NPCs to attack your [[Decoy|decoy]] instead of attacking you. This effect cannot trigger more often than once every thirty seconds.

name: Waylay
short: Shield Heal when Flanking with Directed Energy Weapons.
detailed: :+_____ Shield Regeneration for each facing when attacking an enemy's rear arc with Directed Energy Weapons
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Herald Baltim Heavy Raider]]
basic: *While this starship trait is slotted, any attacks made on an enemy's rear arc will cause you to restore a small amount of your own shields.

name: Weapon Emitter Overdrive
short: +Crit, Accuracy from Energy Weapon Abilities
detailed:
When using a Beam or Cannon Bridge Officer ability:
:For 20 sec:
:*Increases weapon power drained by 50%
:*+10% Critical Chance to Directed Energy Weapons
:*+50 Accuracy Rating
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Vaadwaur Miracle Worker Juggernaut]]
basic: *While active, upon activating any Bridge Officer ability that affects Energy Weapons, you will gain a significant buff to your Directed Energy Weapon Critical Hit Chance and Accuracy Rating, but also increase the weapon power they cost to fire.

name: Weapon System Synergy
short: Torpedo Performance Enhanced by Energy Weapons
detailed:
*On activation of Energy Weapons, gain 1 stack of ''Weapon System Synergy''
*After 10 stacks, Projectile Weapons gain +25% Damage and +50% Shield Bleedthrough for 10sec
*Upon expiration, cannot gain stack again for 20sec
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Manticore Heavy Destroyer]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Duvqu' Heavy Destroyer]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Dinaes Warbird Destroyer]]
*<span title="Dominion">[[File:Faction Dominion.png|16px|link=Dominion-only]]</span> [[Jem'Hadar Vanguard Heavy Destroyer]]
basic: *Each time a directed energy weapon is activated on your ship, you will shunt a small amount of power to your projectile emitters. This is represented by building up stacks of Weapon System Synergy. Upon reaching 10 stacks, your projectile weapons will become primed and deal additional damage and shield bleedthrough for several seconds. After this expires there is a short lockout window before you can begin building up Weapon System Synergy stacks again.

name: Weaponized Exotic Particles
short: Weapon Firing Modes grant Exotic Particle Generators
detailed: *+75 Starship Exotic Particle Generator ''(Improves Exotic Damage)'' during Standard Weapon Firing Modes
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Terran Trailblazer Science Warship]]
basic: *While this trait is slotted, the starship enjoys a bonus to Exotic Particle Generators while under the effect of Cannon Scatter Volley, Cannon Rapid Fire, Beam Fire at Will, Beam Overload, Torpedo Spread, High Yield Torpedo, Dispersal Pattern Alpha or Dispersal Pattern Beta.

name: Weaponized Time Crystals
short: Apply a DoT during Weapon Firing Modes.
detailed: * During special firing modes, weapon attacks apply __ Antiproton Damage per sec for 20 sec (no critical strike).
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Constitution Temporal Flight Deck Carrier]]
basic: * Activating Weapon Firing Modes adds Chroniton distortions to the weapon attacks, applying a stacking [[Antiproton weapons (space)|Antiproton]] damage over time effect on the enemy ship. These distortions accumulate almost indefinitely, eventually tearing the ship's temporal reference field apart. Weaponized [[Time crystal|Time Crystals]] cannot critically strike

Page: Weapons Hot, Deflectors to Full (starship trait)
name: Weapons Hot, Deflectors to Full
short: Emergency Power to Shields grants Secondary Shielding, Weapons Haste.
detailed:
* On Emergency Power to Shields:
** ___ Secondary Shields for 30 sec
** X% - 15% Firing Cycle Haste for Energy Weapons for 30 sec (max, at 150 shield power)
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Inquiry Battlecruiser]] & [[Legendary Avenger Miracle Worker Battlecruiser]]
basic: * Whenever you activate Emergency Power to Shields, you will gain a boost to Weapon Haste that scales with your Shield Power and a temporary Secondary Shielding that lasts for several seconds.

name: Weapons of War
short: Activating Basic Weapon Type boosts all weapons of that Type
detailed:
*Firing any type of basic weapon (Beam/Cannon/Torpedo/Mine) will apply +25% All Damage for that weapon type for 10 seconds
*Each weapon type's effect does not Stack with itself, but all four basic weapon type buffs may apply
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Okinawa Pilot Raider]]
basic: * Weapons of War uses data collated on weapon fire to implement short improvements to all weapons of that type for a short burst. Continued use of those weapons will not stack the effect but can make it semi-continuous.

name: Wild Critical
short: When inflicting or receiving a Critical Hit summons a Wild Weasel Shuttlecraft every 10 seconds (Max 5)
detailed:
Affects Foe (20 max)
:When inflicting or receiving a Critical Hit summons a Wild Weasel Shuttlecraft (Max 5)<br>* Each Shuttlecraft can last for 60s
obtained: *<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Trafalgar Command Juggernaut]]
basic:
* Starfleet developed technology to identify critical strikes and hits and call a Wild Weasel Shuttlecraft out of warp to help distract the enemy, so your ship can either take advantage of the distraction, or move out of the heat of combat more safely.
:Every Critical you receive or apply to or from an enemy every 10 seconds summons a Wild Weasel Shuttlecraft to assist and these craft will remain in the combat zone for 60 seconds and then warp out once their action is complete.

name: Wild Weasel
short: Evasive Maneuvers and Intel BOff Abilities spawn a Taunting Decoy Pet
detailed: * When using [[Evasive Maneuvers (ability)|Evasive Maneuvers]] or [[Intel]] Bridge Officer Abilities, create a ''Wild Weasel Shuttle'' to attract attention of nearby enemies for 20 sec, or until destroyed
obtained: *<span title="Khitomer">[[File:Faction Khitomer.png|16px|link=Cross-Faction Content]]</span> [[Terran Adamant Intel Heavy Raider]]
basic:
*Activating Evasive Maneuvers, or any Intel Bridge Officer Ability, will call in a Wild Weasel Shuttle to distract nearby enemies for 20 seconds. Up to 20 nearby targetable torpedoes and/or mines will be drawn toward the mobile decoy, as well as the 5 nearest enemy vessels being Taunted into attacking it. The Wild Weasel is extremely sturdy for a fighter craft, but even it will eventually be destroyed by the punishment it calls down upon itself.
:This pet may only be created once every 45 seconds.

name: Withering Barrage
short: Extend duration of Cannons: Scatter Volley
detailed: Extends duration of [[Cannons: Scatter Volley (ability)|Cannons: Scatter Volley]] by 4 sec.
obtained:
*<span title="Federation only">[[File:Faction Federation.png|16px|link=Starfleet-only]]</span> [[Legendary Defiant Pilot Warship]] & [[Valiant Tactical Escort]]
*<span title="Klingon only">[[File:Faction Klingon.png|16px|link=Klingon-only]]</span> [[Kor Bird-of-Prey]], [[Legendary B'rel Bird-of-Prey]] & [[M'Chla Bird-of-Prey Refit]]
*<span title="Romulan only">[[File:Faction Romulan Republic.png|16px|link=Romulan Republic-only]]</span> [[Legendary T'liss Light Intel Warbird]] & [[Malem Light Warbird]]
basic: *While Withering Barrage trait is equipped, the duration of your [[Cannons: Scatter Volley (ability)|Cannons: Scatter Volley]] is increased
